programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to the dog-friendly Beck Hall in North Yorkshire, where B&B newbies Louise and Andy Macbeth get a grilling, and one of the guests goes green around the gills.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Avid souvenir collectors Kevin and Julie Shadbolt welcome their rivals to The Albaston in Torquay. Some of the guests are startled by their menagerie of memorabilia.

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Minotaur
programme.desc: When the villagers offer their brethren as a sacrifice to the Minotaur, Theo (Tom Hardy) sets off on a harrowing quest to the labyrinth to kill the evil bull-god.

programme.title: Desolation
programme.desc: A mom, her son, and her best friend go on a journey deep into the wilderness to spread the father's ashes. They find themselves facing their fears when a solitary hiker starts trailing them.

programme.title: 4 Wedding Planners
programme.desc: After Lily rejects her boyfriend's marriage proposal, she returns home to Hawaii where she must help out with her mother's wedding planning business.

programme.title: Capt'n Sharky
programme.desc: Pint-sized swashbuckler Captain Sharky thinks he's the most dangerous pirate on the Seven Seas. To prove his bravery, he sets sail with Mikey.

programme.title: A Costume For Nicholas
programme.desc: Nicolás is a 10-year-old boy. Every year, his mother made him a disguise. Nicolás goes to live with Mia and Tomás, his loving grandparents, and his cousin David, who suffers from nightmares.

programme.title: Maya the Bee: The Honey Games
programme.desc: When an overenthusiastic Maya accidentally embarrasses the Empress of Buzztropolis, she is forced to unite with a team of misfit bugs and compete in the Honey Games for a chance to save her hive.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: Wealthy rancher G.W. McLintock uses his power and influence in the territory to keep the peace between farmers, ranchers, land-grabbers, Indians and corrupt government officials.

programme.title: Eagle's Wing
programme.desc: A white trapper steals a white mustang called "Eagle Wing" from a Kiowa Indian, who pursues him to get his horse back

programme.title: A Summer to Remember
programme.desc: (2018) Sun-drenched romance with Catherine Bell. She's ready for a break - but is she ready for love... When a widowed doctor heads to Fiji, will two potential suitors lead to a life-changing summer?

programme.title: Memoirs of an Invisible Man
programme.desc: After a freak accident, a company executive turns completely invisible, goes on the run, and becomes hunted by a treacherous CIA official while trying to cope with his new reality.

programme.title: Aloha
programme.desc: A military contractor returns to Hawaii for a top-secret mission, reconnects with an old flame, and unexpectedly falls for a spirited pilot, all while uncovering secrets that could change everything.

programme.title: Meet the Spartans
programme.desc: From the creators of Date Movie comes this tongue-in-cheek parody of the sword-and-sandal epics, dubbed Meet The Spartans.

programme.title: Love & Other Drugs
programme.desc: A charming pharmaceutical sales rep reconsiders what he's looking for when he starts to fall for an artist with early-onset Parkinson's disease.

programme.title: Finder's Fee
programme.desc: After finding a wallet holding a winning lottery ticket, a man sees his morals tested when he comes face-to-face with its owner at his weekly poker game.

programme.title: Attack of the Lederhosen Zombies
programme.desc: Three young snowboarders find themselves in an epic battle for survival when a scientific experiment unleashes a horde of zombies and mutant wildlife in the Austrian Alps.

programme.title: The Quest: The Longest Drive
programme.desc: A group of misfit outlaws band together to try and save the farm of an old friend. Starring Kurt Russell (1976).

programme.title: Snapshot of Love
programme.desc: A wedding photographer's happy small town life is turned upside down when a famous Hollywood actor shows up at her parent's lakeside vineyard for his sister's wedding.

programme.title: Candid About Love
programme.desc: Gallery assistant Laura is finally promised a spot in a newcomer's photography showcase - but only if she can get a reclusive artist, Shane, to premiere his newest photographs at the gallery.

programme.title: Alice's Adventures in Wonderland
programme.desc: Alice, whose curiosity leads her into a series of magical misadventures that will delight young and old alike.

programme.title: Tin Man
programme.desc: Hordes of winged monkey-bats, a shape-shifting dog, a cyber-punk sorceress, and a vast hidden underworld. Get ready to follow a whole new yellow brick road.

programme.title: Tin Man: Part 2
programme.desc: Continuing the journey beyond the Yellow Brick Road with the second part of this mini series which re-imagines L. Frank Baum's classic The Wizard of Oz.

programme.title: Cheer For Your Life
programme.desc: Humiliated during initiation week, a high school cheerleader finds herself in grave danger after another girl on the squad turns up dead.

programme.title: Bonds Will Be Broken
programme.desc: When her sister Nina is seduced by a mysterious self-improvement cult, Anna decides to go undercover at the cult's annual retreat to save her sister from the sinister cult leader.

programme.title: Goddess
programme.desc: A hilarious tale about a frustrated and lonely mum who communicates to the world via a webcam and the world likes what it sees!

programme.title: Down with Love
programme.desc: In 1962 New York, love is blooming between a womanizing journalist and a feminist-minded librarian and author, who soon falls into the romantic scheme he devised to teach her a lesson.

programme.title: The Mambo Kings
programme.desc: Dazzling dancing and an Academy Award® nominated song highlight this story of two musician brothers who flee their native Cuba to find success in the Latin music scene of 1950s New York.

programme.title: Dangerous Mind of a Hooligan
programme.desc: The creative collaboration of Paul Tanter and Simon Phillips (White Collar Hooligan) brings you this action packed Football hooligan turned bank robber tale.

programme.title: Hooligan Legacy
programme.desc: Get ready for a visceral story of football, betrayal and revenge in this white-knuckle, hard hitting hooligan thriller. Four men, no strangers to unlawful transgressions.

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: On a trip to Paris, three friends are swept into a whirlwind of wealth and glamour when one of them is mistaken for a British heiress.

programme.title: For the Love of Chocolate
programme.desc: Aria is busy planning for the annual chocolate festival when she loses her competition partner. But when single father Rhett comes to her rescue, will her new recipe come with a dash of love?

programme.title: Eat, Drink and Be Married
programme.desc: Non- profit Wedding planner Billie teams up with Charlie, who promises to save her business, on the condition, she can convince his brother not to call off the wedding

programme.title: Paper Tiger
programme.desc: A respected and courteous English gentleman is hired as a tutor for the son of the Japanese ambassador. His life changes when he and the boy are kidnapped by terrorists for political purposes.

programme.title: Camille
programme.desc: Life in 1847 Paris is as spirited as champagne and as unforgiving as the gray morning after. In gambling dens and lavish soirees.

programme.title: Mister Johnson
programme.desc: In 1923, a local resident of British Colonial Nigeria tries to be equal with the colonial administration.

programme.title: A Mother's Instinct
programme.desc: When a boy goes missing, clues lead his sister and mother to believe their asocial neighbor was involved in the abduction; forcing them to take the law into their own hands.

programme.title: Here Kills the Bride
programme.desc: When her thinly veiled story fails to add up, a woman suspects her brothers new fiancé is up to something dangerous.

programme.title: Summer town
programme.desc: Richard Gere stars as Jack Sommersby, a man who returns home from the war to reclaim his life, seven years after he was presumed dead.

programme.title: The Fountain
programme.desc: Two immortally linked souls transcend the boundaries of time and space, one desperately searching for the answers that will save the other, and deliver the promise of eternal life.

programme.title: High Crimes
programme.desc: High-powered lawyer Clair Kubik has her world turned upside down when her husband, who she thought was Tom Kubik, is arrested and revealed to be Ron Chapman, an ex-Marine accused of murder.

programme.title: Behind the fish of the world's seas

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: Jerry Maguire is a successful representative who works for a major sports company. After going through a crisis of conscience, he is fired and abandoned by all his friends.

programme.title: Prometo Amar-te
programme.desc: A car accident leaves Paige in a coma. When he wakes up, he appears to be suffering from memory loss. Your husband Leo has no choice but to commit to winning your heart for the second time.

programme.title: Murder in...
programme.desc: MURDER IN BALAGNE. Superintendent Emma Colonna returns to Corsica for the first anniversary of the death of her husband, a native of the island. This journey of introspection quickly takes a dramatic turn when the first body is found hanging on the walls of Calvi.

programme.title: Murder in...
programme.desc: MURDER IN AUDIERNE. After the discovery of the body of a young surfer, shot in the heart in La Torche, the capital of Breton surfing, captain Jérémy Laubier is assigned to investigate the murder.

programme.title: Butter
programme.desc: Laura Pickler has enjoyed the distinction of being the beautiful and loyal companion of Iowa's state butter carving champion for 15 years. But her position is threatened by the arrival of an unlikely competitor: a 10-year-old girl full of talent.

programme.title: Poisoned Love: The Stacey Castor Story
programme.desc: Stacey Ruth Castor has overcome the death of her first husband and managed to find love again with her boss, David. But when David is found dead in an apparent suicide, the police suspect foul play.

programme.title: Mona Lisa's Smile
programme.desc: In 1953, an Art History teacher at a girls' school tries to broaden the narrow horizons of her brilliant students. The biggest challenge will be to make the students find (and assume) their cultural identity, starting from a broad and challenging vision of new knowledge.

programme.title: A Love like in Books
programme.desc: A bookstore owner imagines a possible fairytale romance with her new suitor, but suddenly her irritating former business consultant makes her see love from a new perspective.

programme.title: Eternal love (VO)

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the quarantine period, the staff at St. Bonaventure Hospital are trying to resume their routines, at the same time that the Department of Public Health is trying to decide whether or not to review the medical conditions at that hospital.

programme.title: Eternal love (VO)
programme.desc: Emir blames Kemal for what happened to him, but later changes his mind. Asu lies to Kemal to protect Zeynep, who doesn't want to live in that house.

programme.title: War of the Sexes
programme.desc: The real story of the tennis game in 1973, which pitted world No. 1 Billie Jean King and former champion Bobby Riggs face-to-face on the court - in a true war of the sexes.

programme.title: Professor Baldas
programme.desc: Elizabeth Halsey is a teacher who doesn't give up. She is foul-mouthed, cruel and inappropriate and can't wait to marry a rich man so she can stop working. When she meets the new substitute teacher, handsome and rich, she does everything to seduce him!

programme.title: Dressed for Wedding
programme.desc: Jane is a romantic and independent woman who has been a bridesmaid 27 times! Her fairy tale seems far from coming true, until her little sister wins the heart of Jane's boss, with whom she is secretly in love.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: With one fewer doctor and limited resources, Shaun and Morgan take charge of the ER, where a quarantine has been imposed. Andrews helps Melendez and Claire improvise a bone marrow extraction during quarantine in an attempt to save a leukemia patient.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: After the trauma of quarantine, our residents enjoy a day off, away from the hospital, to unwind a little... Back at the hospital, Andrews defends himself against the inquiry from a harsh Department of Public Health employee.

programme.title: Zoom In

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit

programme.title: The Good Karma Hospital
programme.desc: Heartbroken and disillusioned, young Dr Ruby Walker leaves her life in the UK for a fresh start in exotic south India. But when she arrives at “Good Karma Hospital”, nothing is as she expected, especially her new and eccentric boss Lydia Fonseca.

programme.title: Quarto 309
programme.desc: As they think Èlsmet has lost her memory, Lale and Onur continue acting as if everything is perfect. Kurtulus hides in the store, to spend the night there, because he has nowhere to sleep.

programme.title: The Ladies' Paradise
programme.desc: The recognition obtained by Marta fills Umberto with pride, but at the same time complicates his plan to destroy Paradise.

programme.title: The Ladies' Paradise
programme.desc: Umberto Guarnieri obtains information that allows him to finally take control of Paradise.

programme.title: dreamy bird
programme.desc: Leyla gets a better position at the agency for her great effort. Sanem ruins a very important meeting and, because of him, they have to find someone to pretend to be Arthur Capello.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Sahika's return causes new tensions and forces everyone to rethink their alliances. As the pressure mounts, emotional decisions threaten to tear the family apart forever.

programme.title: The Age of Innocence
programme.desc: 19th century. Archer Newlland, a successful lawyer, wants a life with more passion. May's fiancé, Archer resigns himself to the life he has. But when May's - unconventional - cousin returns home, Newland risks everything. Oscar®-winning film in 1994.

programme.title: dreamy bird
programme.desc: Sanem becomes jealous when he meets Mr. Azim's daughter, because he realizes that she is very similar to Can and they have a lot in common. JJ decides to leave Mevkibe's house and she is very sad to see him go.

programme.title: Purple like the sea
programme.desc: Viola is invited to dinner by Raniero, a fascinating young man who may know how to find her missing father. The murder of a banker helps her understand something about her past. Meanwhile, Demir encounters a mysterious young woman at the port.

programme.title: Purple like the sea
programme.desc: Now that she has finally found her father, Viola is aware of what her likely fate will be: an incurable disease, which could one day confine her to a wheelchair.

programme.title: Quarto 309
programme.desc: Onur offers Kurtulus money, but he doesn't accept it and is determined to earn an honest living. Koray enters the flower shop and meets Songül. Kurtulus starts selling lemons.

programme.title: An English Estate
programme.desc: Los Angeles. Promising architect Nora Cartwright's life is about to change. First, she realizes that both her boyfriend Daniel and she are too engaged in their respective careers to be available for a relationship and ends up breaking up.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: While treating a surgical patient with ASD, Shaun and Morgan are intrigued by the “relationship” she has with her roommate. Melendez, Claire and Park try everything to save a woman who has a mechanical heart, which requires a joint and equal effort between medical knowledge and technical engineering skills.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Dr. Andrews tries to convince a grieving family to donate their teenage daughter's face to a young woman whose face was horribly disfigured in an accident.

programme.title: eternal love
programme.desc: Leyla makes a surprise proposal to Galip. Emir tries to find out what happened in the accident and Ozan tries to convince Zeynep to return home.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Yigit's disappearance unleashes chaos and forces everyone to react. As family tensions rise, an unexpected decision completely changes the balance between them.

programme.title: dreamy bird
programme.desc: Can loses his memory after the car accident he suffered. Sanem feels very bad when she realizes that Can doesn't remember anything about her, but she is determined to fight for his love.

programme.title: My Girlfriend Has Amnesia
programme.desc: Henry Roth lives in a Hawaiian paradise, in the company of beautiful women, without commitments. That is, of course, until he met Lucy Whitmore! But Lucy suffers from short-term memory loss and Henry will have to fight to get her to recognize him...

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: Forty-year-old and single again, Bridget Jones focuses on work. But after meeting Jack, a dashing American, Bridget is surprised by a... pregnancy! The problem is that she is only 50% sure about the identity of the baby's father...

programme.title: When the river rises
programme.desc: The story takes place in Tennessee. Despite the threat of a rising river and a poor harvest, Tom Garvey and his wife Mae, a young farming couple, are determined to preserve the land of their ancestors. But, burdened by debt, Tom is forced to become a scab during a strike at the local steel mill, leaving his wife to run the farm. Upon their return, they have to face not only the flooding of a furious river that can wash away the work of so many years but also a power-hungry landowner who covets the lands of the Garveys and their neighbors to satisfy his ambition.

programme.title: The Kaiser's Last Kiss
programme.desc: A German officer is sent to Holland to determine whether the British Secret Service has infiltrated the home of Kaiser Wilhelm II, during the start of World War II, but begins a dangerous and lethal romance with a young Dutch Jew with consequences neither of them could have foreseen.

programme.title: Night of Vengeance
programme.desc: Vincent is a divorced man with a teenage son, Thomas, with whom he barely has a relationship. He works as a police officer in Los Angeles, dealing with corrupt matters hidden from Internal Affairs. After a heist in which he steals a shipment of cocaine from a dealer in Las Vegas, Vincent and his partner Sean Cass volunteer to investigate the case in order to hide their guilt and involvement from Internal Affairs. One afternoon when Vincent is walking with his son, the group of criminals from whom he stole cocaine corners him and kidnaps Thomas, threatening to end his life if he does not return the drugs. The leaders of Internal Affairs suspect Vincent and decide to investigate him. He only has one night to get his son back safe and sound, return the drug shipment, hide the truth from his ex-partner and cleanse his image in front of the heads of Internal Affairs.

programme.title: The big shark (Jaws 3)
programme.desc: Third sequel born as a result of Spielberg's famous film "Jaws". When a baby white shark ends up trapped in a water park, the owner decides to use it as a lure to attract more customers. What is not expected is that the mother, an adult shark measuring more than 35 feet, will go looking for him and begins to kill bathers indiscriminately. Mike Brody, the adult son of Police Captain Brody, who killed a killer shark ten years ago, will try to take down the terrifying beast.

programme.title: Moneyball, breaking the rules
programme.desc: The Oakland Athletics just lost again to the New York Yankees in the 2001 post-season. With their main stars, Johnny Damon, Jason Giambi and Jason Isringhausen leaving for another team, it will be the responsibility of their manager, Billy Beane, to find a solution. On a visit to Cleveland, Beane will meet Peter Brand, a young economics specialist from Yale who has a series of radical ideas about how to enhance the value of each player. As proof that he is right, Peter gives him the keys to why Billy failed when he played in the professional league. Convinced that what he says is true, the manager decides to hire him to completely turn his team around. But this new statistical method provokes terrible controversy. The players don't believe in him and neither do the team's shareholders. Instead of relying on each person's experience, character, or intuition, Billy ranks them based on their base percentage (OBP). Thus, he hires players with a very high OBP but with a series of characteristics that terribly undervalue them: one cannot run, another is too old... But the confrontation and controversy are too broad and now Beane will have to face a losing and demoralized team, an overexcited Peter, the team managers who do not believe in him and an entire country that believes that you cannot play that way. During pre-production on Moneyball, cinematographer Adam Kimmel was arrested for crimes related to sexual harassment and possession of illegal weapons and explosives. He was replaced by Wally Pfister. This is the first movie about baseball to be nominated for an Oscar since "Field of Dreams," twenty-two years earlier. In the film, Billy Beane refers to John Poloni as "Rocco." This is a reference to Jack McGee's father, who played in minor league baseball and whose nickname was "Rocco."

programme.title: The Scholar
programme.desc: Young Jules runs a very successful online fashion business. As part of a new job program, you will have to agree to hire the elderly Ben as a senior intern. You will soon realize that your experience and attitude can be very important to the company.

programme.title: Temptation in Manhattan
programme.desc: After working hard at a Boston financial management company, as night falls, Kate returns home to her husband Richard, who has just lost his job, and their children. When Kate receives an assignment that requires her to travel frequently to New York, Richard gets a job, which further deteriorates family and marital life. To make matters worse, Jack, her charming new colleague, begins to attract her.

programme.title: Platoon
programme.desc: Filmed entirely in the Philippines, "Platoon" tells us about the year a young university student named Chris spends in a regiment, who decides to volunteer for the Vietnam War. First part of a trilogy directed and written by Oliver Stone about the Vietnam War (followed by Born on the Fourth of July and Between Heaven and Earth). The protagonist of this story is a young Charlie Sheen, accompanied by a cast among which we highlight Willem Dafoe, Tom Berenger or some at that time still unknown Forest Whitaker or Johnny Depp. "Platoon" was the first film about Vietnam written and directed by a veteran of that war. Oliver Stone created this masterpiece taken from the experiences that he himself lived on the battlefield in his year as a soldier, filming almost a documentary where he tells us in first person through a character named Chris all his experiences in Vietnam. We are thus witnessing one of the most precise and realistic war films that recount this conflict with excellent direction, a script and impeccable editing. As for the exteriors, they are very well detailed and this perfection makes the viewer quickly immerse themselves in the war atmosphere that surrounds everything without rest. Definitely, a spectacular film that shows what until then Hollywood always tried to hide and the best way to get closer to what those days in Vietnam really were. Classic of the eighties and universal cinema.

programme.title: The client
programme.desc: Mark Sway is an eleven-year-old boy who witnesses the death of a mafia lawyer. Before dying, he confesses some very important information to him. But, fearing retaliation, Mark doesn't dare tell the FBI. The FBI pressures Mark to reveal the lawyer's last words, but he, aware that the mafia is watching him, decides to hire a lawyer to protect him. Adaptation of the best seller of the same name by John Grisham, directed by Joel Schumacher (''A Day of Fury'', ''Batman Forever''). Its plot starting point is vaguely reminiscent of that of ''Sole Witness'', although the Mormon community that surrounded Harrison Ford in Peter Weir's film is replaced here by a single character: that of a devoted lawyer. For this reason, the true core of the film, despite being a thriller, is not the judicial plot, but the relationship established between the boy, played by Brad Renfro (chosen from 5,000 candidates), and his lawyer, a role entrusted to Susan Sarandon, for which she was nominated for an Oscar for best actress. Tommy Lee Jones gave life to the third party, in the shoes of an ambitious prosecutor.

programme.title: Widows
programme.desc: During the escape after committing a robbery, the van in which four thieves intend to escape is shot at by the police and bursts into flames.

programme.title: Son of a Gun
programme.desc: Young JR is accused and imprisoned for a minor crime. When he enters prison he discovers the harshness of life in prison, but he will soon become the protégé of Brendan Lynch, one of the most dangerous prisoners in Australia. However, that protection will have a price and Lynch, along with his team, will have plans for JR when he is released from prison: help them with their escape plan.

programme.title: Demolition
programme.desc: A successful executive struggles to understand his emotional disconnection after the sudden and tragic death of his wife in a car accident. Despite his father-in-law's pressure to recover, Davis remains bewildered and reflects this by compulsively disassembling increasingly conspicuous objects around him.

programme.title: Red hot
programme.desc: Art Jeffries is an FBI agent with respect problems for his superiors. One day he is assigned to investigate the case of a missing boy, Simon, whose parents have been murdered. After finding him, he discovers that he is a nine-year-old autistic boy with a prodigious ability to reveal supposedly insurmountable government codes.

programme.title: Terrorist threat
programme.desc: Ewan, an agent of the British Secret Service, has the mission to capture and eliminate Ash, a university student turned suicide bomber, as well as the cell to which he belongs.

programme.title: my sister's husband
programme.desc: Richard is a Cambridge professor who will find himself involved in an unexpected love triangle. After getting a young and attractive American student pregnant, he will also meet her sister, an eccentric novelist.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: Robert Trench, an undercover DEA agent, takes advantage of gunman Michael Stigman's idea of ​​robbing a bank to get a mob boss out. However, the plan turns out to be exceedingly satisfactory when they get much more money than anticipated and, in addition, Trench's forces do not block their exit. To complicate things a little more. Stigman turns out to be a Navy Intelligence agent who shoots Trench and takes all the money. Soon, a confusing loop will begin in which both forces of the American army will pursue both Trench and Sitgman in a corrupt and dirty plot to each keep the profits. And without anyone expecting it, both Trench and Sitgman discover that they have to work together to be able to survive their own bosses and assault groups and to finally emerge victorious. During the development of the film, Vince Vaughn was going to play Bobby and Owen Wilson was going to play Stig. Also, as a curiosity, in the film's trailer you can hear the song "Die by the drop" from 2010 by the band The Dead Weathers. This song had previously been used in the trailer for Contraband (2012), which also featured Mark Wahlberg and was directed by Baltasar Kormákur.

programme.title: Space Cowboys
programme.desc: When a Russian satellite in orbit around Earth threatens to fall onto the planet, NASA looks to the engineer who designed it to fix it before it enters the atmosphere. Frank Colvin, a former Air Force pilot, was the one who designed the device forty years ago. He was about to travel to space but they finally decided to do without him, truncating all his dreams of being an astronaut. Reluctantly, Frank accepts the mission to travel to space, but on the condition that his team, the one from forty years ago, accompany him on the mission. After some grueling tests, Frank Colvin, Tank Sullica, Jerry O'Neil and Haw Hawkins travel into space to fix the satellite. But when they reach the point where they must carry out their mission, they encounter some more difficult problems than expected. In the film, the four astronauts appear together on 'The Tonight Show with Jay Leno.' To promote the film, the four actors also went to this program. NASA offered the production its 'vomit comet' plane, used to create the state of weightlessness. Clint Eastwood rejected the offer for fear that the elderly actors would become too ill to work. The four actors pretend to be the same age in the film, seventy years old. In reality, the youngest is Tommy Lee Jones, who at the time of filming was only fifty-four years old.

programme.title: The Kaiser's Last Kiss
programme.desc: A German officer is sent to Holland to determine whether the British Secret Service has infiltrated the home of Kaiser Wilhelm II, during the start of World War II, but begins a dangerous and lethal romance with a young Dutch Jew with consequences neither of them could have foreseen.

programme.title: Night of Vengeance
programme.desc: Vincent is a divorced man with a teenage son, Thomas, with whom he barely has a relationship. He works as a police officer in Los Angeles, dealing with corrupt matters hidden from Internal Affairs. After a heist in which he steals a shipment of cocaine from a dealer in Las Vegas, Vincent and his partner Sean Cass volunteer to investigate the case in order to hide their guilt and involvement from Internal Affairs. One afternoon when Vincent is walking with his son, the group of criminals from whom he stole cocaine corners him and kidnaps Thomas, threatening to end his life if he does not return the drugs. The leaders of Internal Affairs suspect Vincent and decide to investigate him. He only has one night to get his son back safe and sound, return the drug shipment, hide the truth from his ex-partner and cleanse his image in front of the heads of Internal Affairs.

programme.title: The beginner
programme.desc: After the murder of his partner, Agent Pulovski (Clint Eastwood), a veteran police officer with a bad temper, will begin working with rookie Ackerman (Charlie Sheen), a young man with emotional problems who is beginning to learn about the profession. Pulovski will try to apprehend the murderers of his former partner, a powerful organization dedicated to the theft and resale of luxury cars. Despite the initial conflicts, both must be understood to locate the brain of the organization.

programme.title: the whole truth
programme.desc: Tom is accused of having murdered innocent civilians in El Salvador, fifteen years ago, in a secret military operation. His wife, Claire, is ready to discover the whole truth...

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Peter Parker is a shy young student. He has never had much confidence in himself and although he is very intelligent, except for his best friend, the rich Harry Osborn, he has no friends. He has been in love with his beautiful redhead neighbor for years: Mary Jane, but he would never find the courage to propose to her. Meanwhile, he lives in a small neighborhood in the New York borough of Queens with his Uncle Ben and Aunt May. His life will change forever when, during a visit to a laboratory, a radioactive spider bites him, causing changes in him that at first seem frightening but will soon make him feel as if he had spider superpowers: he has colossal strength, he can climb walls and ceilings and he can also create spider webs with his hands. With his new powers, Peter becomes more daring. He no longer needs glasses and has acquired muscles that make him very attractive. At school he saves Mary Jane from falling in the cafeteria and accidentally throws food at a bully named "Flash." When he is about to hit him, Peter manages to neutralize him and impresses his friends and the girl of his dreams. To try to win him over, she lies to her Uncle Ben by saying she is going to the library but actually entering a wrestling contest for $3,000. With the money he intends to buy a second-hand sports car for Mary Jane. But when he wins the fight he discovers that the manager does not intend to pay him. Snubbed, he goes out to the street to find his uncle dying on the ground: a thief has shot him to take the car. In his arms, the one who was like a father to him dies. Peter will now become "Spiderman" and use a costume to take revenge on criminals who destroy families like his. Soon his first enemy will appear: The Green Goblin. The Green Goblin was chosen as the villain of this film since director Sam Raimi felt that the father-son duel would make the film more interesting.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer is a top secret government agent with a license to kill who decides to quit his job when he finds and marries the woman of his dreams. But happiness is short-lived, since they have put a price on his head. He doesn't know who is after him, but he knows that there are several murderers and that it could be anyone. His neighbors, his friends, former colleagues, his current co-workers... Spencer will team up with his wife to find out who the mysterious characters are who want him dead before the bullies finish them off... and their marriage!

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Running at full speed around the track, doing everything around, over and through the competition. Speed ​​Racer is a born racer, born to drive racing cars. Speed ​​is aggressive, instinctive and, above all, reckless. His only competition is the memory of his brother, his idol, the legendary Rex Racer, whose death in a race has left a goal that Speed ​​feels the need to fulfill. Speed ​​feels a great loyalty to the family racing business run by his father, Pops Racer, the designer of the powerful Mach 5 car he pilots. When Speed ​​rejects a very lucrative and tempting offer from Royalton Industries, he not only angers the company's maniacal owner but also discovers a terrible secret: some of the most important races are being manipulated by a handful of heartless businessmen who manipulate the most important drivers to get more money. If Speed ​​does not drive for Royalton's team, Royalton will ensure that the Mach 5 never crosses the finish line. The only way Speed ​​can save his family's business and the sport he loves is to beat Royalton at its own game. With the support of his family and his loyal girlfriend, Trixie, Speed ​​teams up with his former rival, the mysterious Racer X, to win the race that killed his brother: the death-defying cross-country rally.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Alan Parrish is a boy who accidentally finds a board game called Jumanji and convinces his friend Sarah to try it, but very strange events begin to occur and the game will catch them and change their lives. By throwing the dice, Alan is transported to a parallel world, where he will not be able to leave until the game ends, but circumstances cause Sarah to leave and Alan is trapped for 26 years in that other world until two new children find the game and start playing.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Two years ago Peter Parker decided to accept his responsibility as Spider-Man and put his personal life aside; within which enter his great love Mary Jane Watson and his friend Harry Osborn, who feels a desire for revenge against Spider-Man for the death of his father. Peter's relationship with both of them is increasingly deteriorating. Peter's friend and role model, Dr. Otto Octavius ​​begins experimenting with fusion energy funded by the current president of Oscorp, who is Harry Osborn. But accidentally, the experiment becomes unstable, so his robotic arms fuse to his spine and he loses control, becoming the villainous Dr. Octopus. Despite this conflict with Octavius, Peter faces the emotional distress caused by knowing that his love Mary Jane is engaged to another man. This makes him think about what his life would be like without having to fight crime, so he will be forced to choose between his personal life as a student and his public obligations. Directed by Sam Raimi, it is the second film in the Marvel superhero saga made by this director, who is also known for his low-budget horror films such as "The Evil Dead" trilogy. He also produced television series such as "Hercules: His Legendary Journeys" or "Xena: Warrior Princess." Tobey Maguire plays Peter Parker in this first Spider-Man trilogy, who made his film debut with "This Boy's Life" and starred in films such as "Pleasantville", "Seabiscuit" and "The Great Gatsby". Kirsten Dunst plays Mary Jane Watson. This actress, model and singer was recognized at the age of 12 for her portrayal of a vampire in "Interview with the Vampire." He also participated in "Jumanji", "The Virgin Suicides" by Sofia Coppola and "Marie Antoinette". James Franco plays Harry Osborn, who began in the series "Freaks & Geeks" and participated in films such as "Milk" or "127 Hours."

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: Due to radioactive mutations that man has been producing over the years for decades, the sea monster Godzilla appears from the depths of the sea to try to stop a series of monsters, animated by man's scientific arrogance, that threaten to destroy humanity.

programme.title: The big shark (Jaws 3)
programme.desc: Third sequel born as a result of Spielberg's famous film "Jaws". When a baby white shark ends up trapped in a water park, the owner decides to use it as a lure to attract more customers. What is not expected is that the mother, an adult shark measuring more than 35 feet, will go looking for him and begins to kill bathers indiscriminately. Mike Brody, the adult son of Police Captain Brody, who killed a killer shark ten years ago, will try to take down the terrifying beast.

programme.title: Darrow y Darrow: En clave de asesinato
programme.desc: Claire and Miles go on a date at the club where Miles' little sister sings. The next day she is arrested for murdering the music producer she just fired and Claire takes the case.

programme.title: hidden figures
programme.desc: As a child, African-American Katherine proved to be a mathematical prodigy. Now, as an adult, she works for NASA... but in the USA of 1961, as a woman and black, her brilliant work means very little.

programme.title: my sister's husband
programme.desc: Richard is a Cambridge professor who will find himself involved in an unexpected love triangle. After getting a young and attractive American student pregnant, he will also meet her sister, an eccentric novelist.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: Robert Trench, an undercover DEA agent, takes advantage of gunman Michael Stigman's idea of ​​robbing a bank to get a mob boss out. However, the plan turns out to be exceedingly satisfactory when they get much more money than anticipated and, in addition, Trench's forces do not block their exit. To complicate things a little more. Stigman turns out to be a Navy Intelligence agent who shoots Trench and takes all the money. Soon, a confusing loop will begin in which both forces of the American army will pursue both Trench and Sitgman in a corrupt and dirty plot to each keep the profits. And without anyone expecting it, both Trench and Sitgman discover that they have to work together to be able to survive their own bosses and assault groups and to finally emerge victorious. During the development of the film, Vince Vaughn was going to play Bobby and Owen Wilson was going to play Stig. Also, as a curiosity, in the film's trailer you can hear the song "Die by the drop" from 2010 by the band The Dead Weathers. This song had previously been used in the trailer for Contraband (2012), which also featured Mark Wahlberg and was directed by Baltasar Kormákur.

programme.title: Space Cowboys
programme.desc: When a Russian satellite in orbit around Earth threatens to fall onto the planet, NASA looks to the engineer who designed it to fix it before it enters the atmosphere. Frank Colvin, a former Air Force pilot, was the one who designed the device forty years ago. He was about to travel to space but they finally decided to do without him, truncating all his dreams of being an astronaut. Reluctantly, Frank accepts the mission to travel to space, but on the condition that his team, the one from forty years ago, accompany him on the mission. After some grueling tests, Frank Colvin, Tank Sullica, Jerry O'Neil and Haw Hawkins travel into space to fix the satellite. But when they reach the point where they must carry out their mission, they encounter some more difficult problems than expected. In the film, the four astronauts appear together on 'The Tonight Show with Jay Leno.' To promote the film, the four actors also went to this program. NASA offered the production its 'vomit comet' plane, used to create the state of weightlessness. Clint Eastwood rejected the offer for fear that the elderly actors would become too ill to work. The four actors pretend to be the same age in the film, seventy years old. In reality, the youngest is Tommy Lee Jones, who at the time of filming was only fifty-four years old.

programme.title: Shark week
programme.desc: Shark experts return to Plettenberg, South Africa, with new technology: a seal-shaped decoy to study and capture the dramatic battles between sharks and seals.

programme.title: Shark
programme.desc: Summer vacation has arrived in the small resort town of Amity Island. While the city council is in charge of making the place a wonderful and entertaining place for tourists, a great threat is approaching, endangering the safety of bathers. The police chief, Martin Brody (Roy Scheider), receives a tip about the disappearance of a young woman on one of the beaches. When they search the terrain, the young woman's dismembered body is found buried in the sand. The coroner's first resolution is that the girl was the victim of a shark attack. The police chief prepares to close access to the beaches but is intercepted by the Mayor. Brody argues with him until the coroner intervenes again and assures that his first conclusion was incorrect, and that the girl died in a terrible accident when she got caught in the propeller of some boat or boat. The police officer resigns and accepts the Mayor's "recommendation." A horde of tourists arrives on Amity Island that same day. While on Chief Brody's watch, a boy is killed by the shark and the truth becomes impossible to hide. A shark hunting specialist named Quin (Robert Shaw) offers his services in exchange for being the only one to receive the entire reward. Anyway, seeing the ferocity of the attacks, Brody asks for help from a marine biologist, Matt Hooper (Richard Dreyfuss), who identifies the shark attack as that of a white shark, one of the most dangerous. Quin, Brody and Hooper will try to hunt the feared animal together before someone else is hurt. The film's soundtrack is composed by John Williams, a highly successful composer who also created the soundtracks for the most renowned films by Steve Spielberg and George Lucas. Among them are those of "Schindler's List" and "Star Wars", in addition to the main theme of the "Harry Potter" saga. The film is based on a novel by writer Peter Benchley.

programme.title: Corruption in Miami
programme.desc: Ricardo Tubbs (Jamie Foxx, Best Actor Oscar for "Ray") and Sonny Crockett (Colin Farrell) are two undercover police officers from Miami (Florida). Ricardo is intelligent, calm and enterprising, while Sonny has his own way of doing things, although always staying close to the law to avoid problems. Their latest mission is to find out the whereabouts of Arcángel de Jesús Montoya (Spanish Luis Tosar, Goya for Best Actor for "Celda 211"), the leader of a gang of drug traffickers, whose men seem to be responsible for a series of recent murders. Writer and director Michael Mann updates the famous series that he created in the 1980s with this elegant thriller, which stands out for its visual splendor, the raw atmosphere it recreates and the excellent action scenes. Chinese actress Gong Li also appears in the cast.

programme.title: Absolute power
programme.desc: Luther, a specialist in grand thefts, plans to rob the mansion of a tycoon who is on vacation in the Caribbean. However, the victim's wife appears unexpectedly.

programme.title: This house is a ruin
programme.desc: Anna (Shelley Long) is a young and attractive violinist who stays for a few days with her boyfriend, the lawyer Walter Fielding (Tom Hanks), in the luxurious apartment of her ex-husband, the great conductor Max Beissart (Alexander Godunov). They are happy, but they want to be even more so. Walter's formula is very simple, happiness is in a little house on the outskirts of New York with its white fence, a dog, two children and a little woman. But, at least for the moment, Anna's intentions do not involve marriage. However, the urgent need to look for a house is imposed when her ex-husband returns suddenly and needs to reoccupy her apartment. Walter turns to his friend Jack (Josh Mostel), a real estate agent, who provides him with a real bargain a few kilometers from New York, a dream house for very little money. After managing to raise the money, the couple buys the house from Estelle, its quirky owner (Maureen Stapleton). But unfortunately, mishaps begin to happen in this fabulous mansion: doorbells burn, the bed sinks, the door falls, steps break, ceilings fall apart, pipes shake and, as the final number, the staircase shatters. But since they still really like the house, with the best of their will they set out to fix the mess. They turn to the service of the unique Shirk brothers, Art (Joe Mantegna), the carpenter, and Brad (Carmine Caridi), the plumber.

programme.title: Together and mixed up
programme.desc: Jim and Lauren have a disastrous blind date and decide not to see each other again. Together with their respective children, the unique couple separately books an idyllic vacation at a luxurious resort dedicated to safaris in Africa. Without knowing they were going to meet, Lauren and Jim end up spending more time together than they imagined.

programme.title: Happiness never comes alone
programme.desc: Sacha is a true seducer who loves to go out, he ignores alarm clocks, engagement rings and taxes. Charlotte is a modern, independent woman who has three children, two ex-husbands, and runs a contemporary art foundation. There is no place for romance in his life. Although they are polar opposites, when they meet, they discover that they are made for each other.

programme.title: TechXplore
programme.desc: In TechXplore: World Cup, presenter Paul Carter looks at how technology is transforming the world's biggest sporting event. In this Set Up episode, Paul travels across the US to test out some of the hi-tech World Cup stadia that will host the 2026 Fifa World Cup and looks at how we might all be watching football in the future.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: Unspun World with John Simpson
programme.desc: John Simpson, in discussion with the BBC's unparalleled range of experts across the world, explores the feelings of ordinary Iranians about the conflict with the United States, analyses the latest extreme global weather warnings and looks at the state of Ethiopia as it heads to the polls.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: AI Decoded
programme.desc: The FIFA 2026 World Cup will be the biggest ever — spanning three countries, 48 teams, 104 matches, and an audience of billions. Now, for the first time, artificial intelligence will sit at the heart of the tournament. From sharper offside decisions to real-time digital replicas of all 16 stadiums, organisers will use AI to monitor crowds, improve safety, and manage the event from a single command centre. For fans, both in the stadium and at home, it promises an entirely new way to experience the game. So will more AI really improve the game? Or risk taking something away from it? AI Decoded explores whether technology can truly enhance football — and what fans actually want from the future of the sport.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: The Climate Question
programme.desc: A global programme that reflects the variety of takes on climate change, how best to understand it and the world's attempts to avert it, temper it or adapt to it. It is not about questioning whether climate change is happening, it's about finding the best ways to respond to it. This is sharp-edged, analytical inquiry. Hard scrutiny, touched with a sense of adventure and discovery, and where we can find it, hope. It includes stories from across the world on why we find it so hard to save our own planet, and how we might change that.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook
programme.desc: Rachel explores this quirky vibrant Spanish city taking in its creativity as she indulges in a traditional chocolaty breakfast and finds a kitchen with a modern take on tapas. Rachel is particularly inspired by the Spanish sweet doughnut churros and by the city's food market. Back home in London, Rachel cooks up savoury churros with a roasted red pepper dipping sauce and some chocolate and fig truffles.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: The latest news, sport, business and weather from the BBC's Breakfast team.

programme.title: Sunday with Laura Kuenssberg
programme.desc: Laura Kuenssberg is joined by David Lammy MP, deputy prime minister; Claire Coutinho MP, shadow equalities minister; and Zia Yusuf, Reform home affairs spokesperson. On the panel, it's Josh Babarinde MP, LibDem; Kay Burley, broadcaster; and Sir Jacob Rees-Mogg, Conservative.

programme.title: BBC News

programme.title: The President's Path
programme.desc: Caitriona Perry, Sumi Somaskanda and Bernd Debusmann unpack the extraordinary falling out between President Trump and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, reportedly a 'blazing row' that both men have since confirmed. Trump was left 'perturbed' that Israeli operations in Lebanon risked derailing his Iran negotiations. But it isn't the first time he has vented at Netanyahu in public. Both insist they still speak almost daily and remain close. But American and Israeli interests in the Iran war are increasingly diverging, US opinion has turned - Pew now finds around 60% of Americans hold an unfavourable view of Israel, up from the low 40s before the 2023 war in Gaza - and influential MAGA voices like Tucker Carlson and Candace Owens are openly questioning the alliance. With Netanyahu accused at home of turning Israel into a 'vassal state', his resistance to a two-state solution stalling Trump's cherished Abraham Accords, and the war itself looking like a strategic failure, is the 'ironclad' US-Israel relationship finally starting to crack?

programme.title: BBC News

programme.title: BBC News

programme.title: The Media Show
programme.desc: A new Netflix documentary follows the final stage of Rafael Nadal's tennis career. The series is the latest high-profile sports documentary made for a streaming platform. Zachary Heinzerling, director of Rafa, outlines how the film was made and the level of access his team received. Minal Modha, senior research director at Ampere Analysis, provides context on the growing business of sports documentaries. In Scotland, Peter Murrell's guilty plea to embezzling funds from the SNP has renewed attention on the reporting that first raised questions about the affair. John Ferguson, political editor at the Sunday Mail, reflects on his own journalism. Laura Kuenssberg explains how she secured the first broadcast interview with Nicola Sturgeon since her estranged husband's conviction. CBS News is facing upheaval following changes in leadership and the departure of several senior figures. The latest developments centre on the dismissal of veteran correspondent Scott Pelley after public criticism of the network's direction. Michael Grynbaum, media correspondent at The New York Times, outlines the story.

programme.title: BBC News

programme.title: Tech Now
programme.desc: Harriet Bradshaw finds out how AI is being used to help solve an art history mystery. Nick Kwek visits the University of Texas to explore new innovations in hydrogen car technology. Andrew Rogers heads behind the scenes of Pinewood Studios. And Paul Carter meets the robodog helping to analyse plants and crops.

programme.title: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Reports of sexual assault and harassment on trains and at stations are on the rise, but victims say CCTV cameras are often broken or of such poor quality that their attackers can't be identified. We follow British Transport Police officers and staff as they race against time to gather the crucial evidence they need to bring offenders to justice.

Punched by Love
programme.desc: Meskipun ibunya melarang, Indah tetap ingin menjadi seorang petinju. Saat sanggar tinju mengeluarkannya karena kesalahan pengisian data, Indah belajar kepada seorang rekan sesama petinju. Dan cinta pun tumbuh di antara mereka.

programme.title: Toko Kr.Amat Bantal Mimpi Indah
programme.desc: Marina mendapatkan bantal dari toko KR. Amat. Bantal ini punya khasiat jika digunakan saat tidur maka waktu bisa diputar kembali. Segala sesuatu yang menyangkut masa lalu dapat terulang kembali dan apapun yang diinginkan terwujud

programme.title: Cintaku Tak Seindah FTV
programme.desc: Ada tetangga baru yang bikin Alya kepincut dengan ketampanannya. Ramzi, cowok ganteng dan keren itu bikin Alya penasaran. Alya seorang penulis FTV, kerap menulis cerita percintaan. Apakah kisah nyatanya bakal seindah cerita FTV?

programme.title: Bangkitnya Rawa Rontek
programme.desc: Rontek, seorang pendekar jahat yang menguasai ilmu hitam bernama 'rawa rontek' yang bisa menjadikannya kebal. Suatu ketika Rontek harus menghadapi lawan tangguh yang memiliki ilmu 'pancasona'.

programme.title: Cincin Wali
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda dari kota melihat gadis yang pernah ditemuinya dalam mimpi. Dia memutuskan untuk tinggal di pesantren yang sama dengan gadis tersebut. Namun, untuk mendapatkan gadis itu dia harus memperoleh cincin wali.

programme.title: Silat Boy The Series 2
programme.desc: Saat di rumah Ken, Mpok Yagi meminta izin pada Mama Ken untuk pulang kampung. Mada dan Ken berencana untuk ikut bersama Mpok Yagi. Di kampung Mpok Yagi inilah, diselenggarakan kompetisi silat.

programme.title: Pangeran Kodok
programme.desc: Joshua meminta nasihat pada Ki Abra yang memberinya mantra, namun mantra tersebut hanya bisa dipakai sekali dan tidak boleh salah ucap. Saat mencoba mantranya, Joshua melakukan kesalahan besar.

programme.title: Janda Janda Jagoan
programme.desc: Maya, Anggi, dan Sindy adalah tiga perempuan jagoan yang berstatus janda. Mereka menjadi incaran penjahat. Vina, anak Anggi diculik oleh penjahat itu. Dapatkah tiga jagoan ini membebaskan Vina?

programme.title: Ketemu Cinta Di Online Shop
programme.desc: Rayya adalah mahasiswa yang menekuni bisnis online. Dia mendapat saingan yaitu Pras, teman kampusnya yang juga punya bisnis toko online. Setelah kalah bersaing, Pras bekerja untuk Rayya, dan mereka saling jatuh cinta.

programme.title: Dear Mantan
programme.desc: Vino akan melanjutkan kuliah ke luar negeri selama 4 tahun sehingga Bella menerima cinta Dirly, cowok keren dan kaya. Tiba-tiba Vino menghubungi Bella dan akan kembali ke Jakarta. Persoalan semakin keruh Dirly adalah saudara Vimo

programme.title: Tempe Mendoan Bumbu Cinta
programme.desc: Marvin adalah cowok tampan kaya raya yang sayang neneknya, dan sang nenek ingin sekali makan tempe mendoan. Marvin pun tak tahu pencariannya akan hidangan itu akan membawanya ke kisah asmara.

programme.title: Perjalanan Terlarang
programme.desc: Mala dan temannya merencanakan untuk berkemah di hutan belantara, tetapi Mala dilarang orang tuanya dan mereka tetap nekat. Sejak itu mereka terjebak di hutan yang jauh dari keramaian.

programme.title: The Power Of Emak-Emak
programme.desc: Ibu Elis mengkhawatirkan Ira, anaknya pacaran dengan Andra. Ira tidak menyadari Andra itu playboy. Ibu Elis tidak setuju Ira melanjutkan hubungannya dengan Andra karena Andra sudah dua kali menabrak Ibu Elis saat di jalan raya.

programme.title: Factory Cinta
programme.desc: Karin melaksanakan tugas KKN di sebuah desa terpencil selama dua minggu. Merasa bosan, dia dan sahabatnya, Dinda, pergi ke kota untuk berbelanja tapi justru kemalingan dan tersesat. Lalu, Aman datang menyelamatkannya.

programme.title: Kepentok Cinta Sementara
programme.desc: Arga diultimatum pihak kampus untuk melunasi biaya kuliah, Arga sama sekali tidak mempunyai uang. Beruntung ada Bonar yang bersedia meminjamkan uang, namun ada syaratnya yaitu, menjadi pacar sementara adiknya.

programme.title: Saat Teduh Bersama Gereja Mawar Sharon
The Lady Professional
programme.desc: Lily Ho berperan sebagai wanita penggoda dalam film thriller kontemporer Shaw Brothers ini. Berlatar di Hong Kong dan Jepang, film ini bercerita tentang Ho yang menyadari jika dirinya menjadi target pembunuhan.

programme.title: The Monkey Goes West
programme.desc: Film mengesankan yang diangkat dari kisah klasik Perjalanan Ke Barat ini menampilkan interpretasi nan unik yang dibumbui dengan humor, aksi laga dan kisah fantasi.

programme.title: Rendezvous With Death
programme.desc: Disutradarai oleh Sun Chung, seorang sutradara berbakat, film ini berkisah tentang seorang ahli pedang yang melindungi sebuah peti harta karun dalam sebuah perjalanan yang berbahaya.

programme.title: The Millionaire Chase
programme.desc: Peter Chen Ho adalah seorang playboy tampan yang mengencani tiga gadis kakak beradik, dan hal ini memicu serangkaian peristiwa konyol dan menghebohkan.

programme.title: Village Of Tigers
programme.desc: Para penduduk jahat dari Desa Macan, yang dipimpin oleh Hu Jiao, berencana untuk membunuh Lo Hong Shun, atau dikenal sebagai Pahlawan Pedang dari Langit Selatan.

programme.title: No doubt Charn
programme.desc: Berlatar di masa Dinasti Han, sekelompok orang yang dipimpin oleh Yang Chi-ching dan Lin Dai, berupaya untuk memisahkan sang gubernur dengan putranya dan akhirnya menyebabkan mereka saling memusuhi.

programme.title: The Singing Thief
programme.desc: Sutradara seni bela diri legendaris Chang Cheh mencoba peruntungannya dalam film musikal bersama penyanyi wanita asal Taiwan, Lin Chong, yang berperan sebagai pencuri permata yang berubah haluan menjadi penyanyi klub.

programme.title: Return Of The Crazy Bumpkins
programme.desc: Film sekuel ini bercerita tentang imigran Yeh Feng yang kabur dari penjara untuk tinggal bersama paman Wang Sha yang jahat. Namun, ternyata kekasihnya, Ai Ti, telah menikah dengan seorang pria yang kasar.

programme.title: The Duel
programme.desc: Usai saudaranya membunuh kepala triad saingannya, Jie menjadi tersangka dan diburu oleh para pembunuh. Dengan bantuan Nan, ia akhirnya menghabisi musuhnya, tapi kemudian ia tahu bahwa Nan lah yang membunuh ayahnya.

programme.title: Sons Of Good Earth
programme.desc: Film peraih penghargaan untuk naskah dan penyuntingan terbaik ini menceritakan kisah lain dari Perang Tiongkok-Jepang yang menggambarkan dengan jelas kehidupan masa perang secara artistik dan emosional.

programme.title: The Condemned
programme.desc: David Chiang menjadi tokoh budiman yang menolong pendekar pedang tak bersalah yang dipenjara karena dituduh mencuri. Bersama mereka mendobrak penjara dan menggertak para penjahat.

programme.title: Blue Skies
programme.desc: Cheng Pei-pei berperan sebagai seorang penyanyi muda bernama Hsiao-Yun yang bimbang antara kesuksesannya dalam karier dan hubungannya dengan sang kekasih, seorang pianis bernama Li Yen-nan.

programme.title: The Killer Has No Return
programme.desc: Pembunuh profesional Lui pergi ke Malaysia setelah melaksanakan misinya membunuh seorang bos geng besar Hong Kong. Target selanjutnya adalah pengantin pria yang mengadakan pesta pernikahan di sebuah hotel di Pecinan.

programme.title: Sweet And Wild
programme.desc: Hsiao Fang adalah seorang gadis yang tidak takut untuk melawan para preman. Sayangnya, ia mengira Ma Ta-hai yang tampan sebagai salah satu preman itu. Keduanya saling tertarik, namun mereka menolak untuk mengakuinya.

programme.title: Swordswomen Three
programme.desc: Pada awal tiga dekade, Shen Yi, Essie Lin Chia, dan Pan Ying-tzu menampilkan superstar internasional Shaw yang pertama, Lo Lieh untuk Han Family Sword memberikan suguhan bintang empat untuk penggemar film laga ini.

programme.title: Swordswomen Three
programme.desc: Pada awal tiga dekade, Shen Yi, Essie Lin Chia, dan Pan Ying-tzu menampilkan superstar internasional Shaw yang pertama, Lo Lieh untuk Han Family Sword memberikan suguhan bintang empat untuk penggemar film laga ini.

programme.title: Challenge Of The Gamesters
programme.desc: Wong Jing menciptakan genre film perjudian hampir sendirian, dan dalam salah satu film laris awalnya, Shih Hsien memimpin pemeran bintang dalam kisah tentang mata-mata, taipan, dan gadis cantik.

programme.title: Rose, Be My Love
programme.desc: Berlatar pada malam penyerbuan Jepang di Hong Kong, film tentang kisah cinta yang tragis produksi Shaw Brothers ini dibintangi oleh Li Ting dan Kwan Shan sebagai sepasang kekasih yang terpisahkan oleh perang.

programme.title: Mr. Funnybone
programme.desc: Saksikan kelucuan Funny Bone saat ia berusaha memenangkan hati seorang wanita tangguh. Bersama dengan sahabat karibnya, Big Potato, seorang lelaki gagah yang selalu mengalami berbagai hal konyol.

programme.title: The Tigress Of Shaolin
programme.desc: Sam diburu saat mengetahui bahwa walikota dan kepala biro medis bersekongkol dengan seorang pengedar narkoba. Ia melarikan diri ke Shaolin untuk mempelajari kung fu demi membalaskan dendam teman-temannya.

programme.title: The Emperor And The Minister
programme.desc: Kaisar Qianlong bukanlah penerus takhta yang sah sejak lahir, tetapi ia baru mengetahui kebenarannya saat dua anggota senior organisasi rahasia anti-pemerintah menghubunginya beberapa tahun kemudian.

programme.title: The Magnificent Swordsman
programme.desc: The Magnificent Swordsman memusatkan pada sumpah seorang pahlawan untuk membalaskan dendam pada bandit-bandit jahat yang membunuh keluarganya saat ia masih kecil.

programme.title: My Name Ain't Suzie
programme.desc: Mei Li muda bekerja sebagai pelayan bar di Wanchai untuk mencari nafkah. Ia jatuh cinta pada Jimmy saat bertemu dengannya di sana. Namun, Mei Li merasa sangat terpukul saat Jimmy harus pergi.

programme.title: Executioners From Shaolin
programme.desc: Pendeta Alis Putih mendukung pemerintah Qing yang kejam, dan membakar kuil Shaolin serta memburu para muridnya. Hung dari Shaolin jatuh cinta pada Fang saat melarikan diri dan ia dibunuh oleh sang Pendeta.

programme.title: Forever And Ever
programme.desc: Lo Wei mengarahkan film romantis yang menampilkan bakat akting Ivy Ling Po nan luar biasa. Film ini bercerita tentang seorang sarjana muda yang diperdaya untuk menikahi seorang putri bangsawan.

programme.title: Heroes Of Sung
programme.desc: Dalam film kung fu klasik ini, Shih Zu, salah satu pahlawan wanita di perfilman laga Hong Kong, bekerjasama dengan Lo Lieh untuk menemukan dan melindungi segel kerajaan Dinasti Sung.

programme.title: Rear Entrance
programme.desc: Nyonya Xu melihat seorang gadis kecil bermain sendirian di pintu masuk dari jauh setiap hari. Ia dengan hangat mengasuh gadis itu, lalu mengadopsinya dari orang tuanya yang tak memedulikannya.

programme.title: Voyage Of Emperor Chien Lung
programme.desc: Kaisar Chien Lung melanjutkan penyamarannya ke Tiongkok Selatan. Ditemani oleh menteri dan sarjana kekaisaran, mereka memiliki banyak kejadian menarik di Yangzhou.

programme.title: Twin Blades Of Doom
programme.desc: Seorang mantan pendekar terpaksa kembali beraksi setelah keluarganya dibunuh oleh Geng Hantu yang kejam. Tanpa teman, ia harus menghadapi kelima pembunuh seorang diri.

programme.title: Crazy Shaolin Disciples
programme.desc: Tiga pendekar kung fu dari latar belakang yang sangat berbeda menjadi murid Shaolin di kuil yang sama: Lo Lieh sang Pengawal Kerajaan, Lo Meng sang tentara yang melarikan diri, dan Wang Yu si pria desa.

programme.title: Crazy Shaolin Disciples
programme.desc: Tiga pendekar kung fu dari latar belakang yang sangat berbeda menjadi murid Shaolin di kuil yang sama: Lo Lieh sang Pengawal Kerajaan, Lo Meng sang tentara yang melarikan diri, dan Wang Yu si pria desa.

programme.title: Six Assassins
programme.desc: Tuan Li Ming adalah penguasa nan kejam yang menindas rakyat. Bahkan Kaisar yang merupakan saudaranya pun tak bisa menghentikannya. Pendekar pedang Mu menyamar sebagai penjaga Li Ming dan berencana untuk membunuhnya.

programme.title: The Lady Assassin
programme.desc: Dua pangeran berseteru memperebutkan takhta di Dinasti Qing. Bisakah wanita pembunuh yang terlibat dalam perseteruan kerajaan ini menjalankan misinya demi membantu salah satu pangeran mendapatkan takhta?

programme.title: The Black Tavern
programme.desc: Sebuah penginapan menjadi tempat para penjahat bertemu guna merencanakan kejahatan mereka. Sekelompok penjahat tertarik ke tempat tersebut karena desas-desus tentang sebuah harta berharga yang disembunyikan di sana.

programme.title: Empress Wu
programme.desc: Wu Ze Tian adalah seorang selir Kaisar Tang yang berusia 14 tahun nan cantik dan berbakat. Ia menjadi biarawati usai sang kaisar meninggal, tapi ia memiliki dua putra dengan Kaisar Tang Gao Zong.

programme.title: Dragon Swamp
programme.desc: Ksatria Pengembara menghadapi Guru Naga Rawa dalam perseteruan keluarga yang telah berlangsung selama 20 tahun. Dalam film aksi nan epik dan emosional ini, semua orang memperebutkan Pedang Naga Giok.

programme.title: Let's Fall In Love
programme.desc: Film komedi romantis yang dibintangi artis legendaris Lin Feng Jiao ini menceritakan kisah cinta yang tak biasa antara putra seorang pengusaha dan keponakan perempuan dari seorang kepala sekolah taman kanak-kanak.

programme.title: Mad Monkey Kung Fu
programme.desc: Seorang mantan ahli kung fu gaya monyet yang dikalahkan oleh seorang penjahat kejam diyakinkan oleh murid mudanya untuk mengajarinya kung fu gaya monyet demi membalas rasa malunya.

programme.title: The Comedy Of Mismatches
programme.desc: Dua pasangan kekasih saling tertukar secara tidak sengaja. Sang pria menyamar sebagai wanita untuk upacara pernikahan saudara perempuannya, sedangkan kekasihnya menyamar sebagai pria untuk menikahi wanita lain.

programme.title: Notorious Eight
programme.desc: Chen Chi-chin kalah banyak dari penjudi berpengalaman Hu Kuan-ten. Ayahnya kalah dalam permainan kartu dan mati karena kaget. Chen meminta bantuan pamannya yang memanggil 7 rekan penjudi untuk melampiaskan dendam.

programme.title: Moods Of Love
programme.desc: Film yang berlatar di era Dinasti Song ini mengisahkan dua cerita tentang seberapa jauh seseorang akan berkorban demi cinta atau nafsu.

programme.title: Shaolin Prince
programme.desc: Ketika Kaisar dibunuh dan takhtanya dirampas oleh Lord 9, kedua pangeran yang masih bayi dipercayakan dalam perawatan tiga biksu Shaolin dan sang perdana menteri.

programme.title: Na Cha And The Seven Devils
programme.desc: Saat mencuri satu buah persik ajaib dari sebuah pohon mistik di Surga, Na Cha kecil secara tidak sengaja menjatuhkan tujuh buah persik lainnya ke Bumi, yang mengubah tujuh hewan berbeda menjadi tujuh iblis.

programme.title: The Bully
programme.desc: Mengikuti jejak film komedi kung fu 'ala Jackie Chan' yang populer, film aksi petualangan yang menghibur ini bercerita tentang seorang pelayan teraniaya yang belajar bela diri untuk menghajar seorang pelanggan kejam.

programme.title: The Shadow Boxer
programme.desc: Petinju Tai Chi nan hebat, Ku Ting, menyembunyikan keahliannya dengan bekerja sebagai pekerja konstruksi. Namun, saat para preman menyerang kekasihnya, ia akhirnya menggunakan kung fu guna mengalahkan musuh-musuhnya.

programme.title: Mr. Possessed
programme.desc: Riley diberi kemampuan untuk menahan godaan dari lawan jenis namun hal itu menjadi beban ketika ia hendak menikahi kekasihnya.

programme.title: Wusong Vs Ximenqing
programme.desc: Wu Song mengetahui perselingkuhan adik iparnya dengan pria kaya bernama Ximen Qing. Song pun dijebak dan diasingkan selama setahun oleh Qing, sementara sang adik dibunuh. Bisakah ia membalas kematian saudaranya?

programme.title: Royal Tramp 2
programme.desc: Wei si badut, yang kemudian menjadi mata-mata rahasia, lalu menjadi pejabat tinggi di istana kekaisaran Tiongkok, berusaha sekuat tenaga untuk menghadapi faksi-faksi yang bertikai dan para ahli bela diri mematikan yang semuanya berebut kekuasaan.

programme.title: Maoshan Heavenly Master
programme.desc: Tn. Zhang diusir dari klannya setelah tahanan Chi melarikan diri di bawah pengawasannya. Lalu, Tn. Zhang datang ke sebuah lokasi tempat hilangnya sejumlah orang dan menemukan bahwa Chi lah yang menangkap mereka.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Paman Hua adalah pensiunan agen yang memiliki toko barang antik di sebuah jalan tua. Namun, jalan itu dihancurkan secara paksa oleh Geng Naga Hijau setempat, dan membuat identitas Paman Hua tak sengaja terungkap.

programme.title: From Beijing With Love
programme.desc: Seorang mata-mata Tiongkok yang telah pensiun selama sepuluh tahun dan mencari nafkah sebagai tukang daging dikirim ke Hong Kong untuk menemukan tengkorak Tyrannosaurus rex yang dicuri.

programme.title: King Of Beggars
programme.desc: Putra dari keluarga kaya jatuh cinta pada seorang wanita yang hanya akan menikahinya setelah ia menjadi seorang Guru Kung-Fu. Dalam 'Drama Komedi' ini, ia menjadi pahlawan legendaris dengan berusaha menyelamatkan kaisar, dalam pencarian cintanya yang sebenarnya.

programme.title: Mr. Virgin
programme.desc: Ketika seorang pemuda mengabaikan peringatan seorang ahli feng shui dan memutuskan untuk menikah sebelum berusia 30 tahun, serangkaian kesialan mulai mengutuk hidupnya.

programme.title: The Mask Of Shura Of Fire Cloud
programme.desc: Klan Black Feather nan jahat menyusup ke wilayah Master Fire Cloud dan mencuri Topeng Shura, sehingga melepaskan roh jahat nan masih bayi. Namun, Master Fire Cloud mengadopsi bayi itu untuk mencegahnya menjadi jahat.

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: Seorang gadis muda bertemu dengan seorang novelis di sebuah bar dan langsung jatuh cinta padanya. Namun, ternyata ia malah terperangkap ke dalam jebakan yang direkayasa oleh si novelis dan mantan kekasihnya.

programme.title: The Flying Mr. B
programme.desc: Mr. B, yang memiliki nama lengkap Benjamin Barker, adalah seorang pegawai kantoran yang menjalani kehidupan monoton. Suatu hari, dalam sebuah insiden aneh di laboratorium ilmiah tempat temannya bekerja, Mr. B terpapar dengan zat misterius yang memberinya kemampuan untuk terbang. Awalnya, dia merasa bingung dan takut, tetapi segera dia mulai mengeksplorasi kekuatan barunya dengan penuh semangat.

programme.title: The Grandmaster
programme.desc: Ip Man menerima sebuah tantangan bertarung dari master asal utara yang sudah tua bernama Gong Yu Tian dan berhasil memenangkannya. Namun, ia dikalahkan oleh putri sang master, Gong Er, dan jatuh cinta padanya.

programme.title: The Grandmaster
programme.desc: Ip Man menerima sebuah tantangan bertarung dari master asal utara yang sudah tua bernama Gong Yu Tian dan berhasil memenangkannya. Namun, ia dikalahkan oleh putri sang master, Gong Er, dan jatuh cinta padanya.

programme.title: The Bare-Footed Kid
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda tiba di kota untuk bekerja dengan teman mendiang sang ayah. Ketika toko pewarna mereka dibakar oleh seorang pemimpin geng setempat, ia memutuskan untuk melawan demi melindungi dan menyelamatkan toko.

programme.title: Hong Kong, Hong Kong
programme.desc: Kisah tentang pengalaman imigran ilegal dari Tiongkok daratan yang berhasil sampai ke Hong Kong untuk kehidupan yang lebih baik.

programme.title: Challenge Of The Gamesters
programme.desc: Wong Jing menciptakan genre film perjudian hampir sendirian, dan dalam salah satu film laris awalnya, Shih Hsien memimpin pemeran bintang dalam kisah tentang mata-mata, taipan, dan gadis cantik.

programme.title: The Sorcerer & The White Snake
programme.desc: Seorang biksu ulung berusaha melindungi seorang dokter muda yang naif dari iblis ular berusia seribu tahun. Pertarungan kekuatan psikis berujung pada kekacauan.

programme.title: The Monkey Is Back
programme.desc: Monyet Batu, memberikan harapan kepada seorang gadis kecil nan putus asa. Namun, Monyet Batu dikalahkan dalam pertempuran melawan Dewa Perang bermata tiga, yang membuatnya kehilangan kekuatan dan jatuh ke dunia fana.

programme.title: Seeding Of A Ghost
programme.desc: Kehidupan seorang sopir taksi Hong Kong berubah mengerikan setelah secara tidak sengaja menabrak seorang penyihir dengan taksinya. Dia memutuskan untuk meminta bantuan penyihir tersebut untuk membalikkan kutukan kepada musuh-musuhnya dengan mengorbankan nyawanya sendiri.

programme.title: Fight Back To School 2
programme.desc: Sing mengundurkan diri dari kepolisian setelah diturunkan pangkatnya ke bagian pengaturan lalu lintas, sementara rekannya ditugaskan dalam misi yang melibatkan teroris asing yang mengancam akan mengebom sebuah sekolah di Hong Kong, sehingga Sing memutuskan untuk membantu dengan menyamar di sekolah yang sama.

programme.title: Chinese Odyssey: Pandora's Box
programme.desc: Raja Kera bereinkarnasi dalam wujud bukan manusia sebagai Joker, seorang perampok jalanan yang tidak menyadari identitas aslinya dan fakta bahwa 500 tahun sebelumnya, dia dan tuannya, Biksu Panjang Umur, dihukum dan dipaksa untuk tetap menjadi manusia.

programme.title: Blind War
programme.desc: Mantan kapten SWAT, Dong Gu, menderita kehilangan penglihatan traumatis kala gagal menjalankan misi. Namun, musuh bebuyutannya muncul dan membuat putrinya dalam bahaya. Ia pun harus berjuang menyelamatkan putrinya.

programme.title: Blind War
programme.desc: Mantan kapten SWAT, Dong Gu, menderita kehilangan penglihatan traumatis kala gagal menjalankan misi. Namun, musuh bebuyutannya muncul dan membuat putrinya dalam bahaya. Ia pun harus berjuang menyelamatkan putrinya.

programme.title: Iron Kung Fu Fist
programme.desc: Liang Kun adalah seorang ahli bela diri terampil yang bertarung untuk membalas dendam atas kematian sang kekasih dengan bantuan dari seorang pemimpin geng pengemis.

programme.title: Get In The Dark
programme.desc: Nona Qiao meninggal secara tak wajar dan kepala pelayannya membayar seorang perajin untuk membuat sebuah boneka kertas. Serangkaian peristiwa nan mengerikan terjadi saat arwah Nona Qiao bangkit untuk membalas dendam.

programme.title: Operation Bangkok
programme.desc: Seorang veteran militer, Wu Wei, dan seorang polisi yang tengah menyamar, Tian Ming, memimpin sebuah tim untuk menyelamatkan para sandera yang ditangkap oleh sekelompok penjahat di sebuah pulau di luar Bangkok.

programme.title: Sixty Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Seorang playboy kaya tewas akibat diledakkan oleh seorang gangster ketika ia menggoda istri gangster tersebut. Melalui serangkaian kejadian, profesornya membuatkan tubuh sintetis yang memungkinkannya untuk berubah menjadi apa pun yang diinginkannya.

programme.title: Drunken Master
programme.desc: Wong Fei-Hung adalah seorang pemuda yang nakal namun saleh, tetapi setelah serangkaian insiden, ayahnya yang frustrasi menyuruh seorang guru bela diri mabuk untuk mendisiplinkannya.

programme.title: Whatever You Want
programme.desc: Anita Yuan Yung-yi berperan sebagai seorang anak perempuan yang tidak sengaja menemukan sebuah mutiara dengan jin di dalamnya. Michael Wong berperan sebagai jin yang mengabulkan tiga permintaannya.

programme.title: Painted Faces
programme.desc: Sebelum memenangkan pujian dalam film laga berkat aksi-aksi mereka yang berani, para bintang ini menjalani tahun-tahun penuh darah, keringat, dan air mata saat berlatih di bawah bimbingan Master Yu yang kejam.

programme.title: Ghost Wedding
programme.desc: Seorang fotografer terjerat oleh sesosok 'wanita berbaju merah' hingga menyebabkan kerabatnya tewas satu per satu. Ia pun bersumpah untuk mencari tahu kebenarannya saat gadis yang ia sukai juga tewas secara misterius.

programme.title: Lifeline
programme.desc: Film ini berkisah tentang seorang pemadam kebakaran yang rela menerjang bahaya dan mempertaruhkan nyawanya demi menyelamatkan orang lain. Akan tetapi, apakah ia memiliki keberanian untuk menghadapi masalah pribadinya?

programme.title: The Case Of Disappearances
programme.desc: Ketika Qing Cheng masih remaja, ia diserang oleh monster mutan yang tidak dikenal dan kehilangan keluarga serta ingatannya. Ia dianggap oleh penduduk desa sebagai orang yang tidak menyenangkan yang akan membawa bencana.
