programme.desc: Ketika kastil terbesar di Inggris dirampok oleh bos kejahatan terkenal (Jon Campling, Pelahap Maut Harry Potter), hal terakhir yang ia dan geng kriminalnya harapkan adalah menghadapi dua anak laki-laki di BMX dan ayah mereka yang seorang pembalap speedway.

programme.title: Nightmare Alley: Possession
programme.desc: Seorang penipu yang berusaha naik dari pekerja karnaval rendahan menjadi medium paranormal terkenal harus adu kecerdikan dengan seorang psikolog yang bertekad membongkar tipu dayanya.

programme.title: How To Be Really Bad
programme.desc: Ketika putri Iblis bosan dengan kehidupan di neraka, ayahnya mengirimnya ke Bumi untuk mengubah orang-orang di sana menjadi jahat.

programme.title: The Healer
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda tiba-tiba menyadari bahwa ia memiliki karunia penyembuhan. Saat ia mencoba memahaminya dan kenyataan baru yang ditawarkannya, seorang gadis remaja dengan kanker stadium akhir tiba-tiba menunjukkan jalan kepadanya.

programme.title: Nightmare Alley: Possession
programme.desc: Seorang penipu yang berusaha naik dari pekerja karnaval rendahan menjadi medium paranormal terkenal harus adu kecerdikan dengan seorang psikolog yang bertekad membongkar tipu dayanya.

programme.title: Homekilling Queen
programme.desc: Whitney, putri gila dari Connie yang kaya dan sama-sama terganggu jiwanya, bertekad untuk menjadi Ratu Homecoming - dan tidak ada yang akan menghalanginya. Natasha memutuskan untuk melarikan diri; dia tidak memiliki firasat tentang perang yang akan dilancarkan Whitney dan ibunya untuk menghentikannya.

programme.title: Nightmare Alley: Possession
programme.desc: Seorang penipu yang berusaha naik dari pekerja karnaval rendahan menjadi medium paranormal terkenal harus adu kecerdikan dengan seorang psikolog yang bertekad membongkar tipu dayanya.

programme.title: Cowboy And Indiana
programme.desc: Seorang juara penunggang banteng berjuang melawan kecanduan.

programme.title: Come Dance At My Wedding
programme.desc: Tanner Gray terkejut mengetahui setelah kematian mantan istrinya, Andrea, bahwa ia memiliki seorang putri berusia 25 tahun, Cyd. Ia dan istrinya bertemu di sebuah kapal pesiar lebih dari 25 tahun yang lalu, di mana keduanya bekerja sebagai instruktur tari. Mereka jatuh cinta dan menikah, tetapi sementara Andrea ingin menetap di kota kecil asalnya dan mengambil alih studio tari orang tuanya, Tanner berasal dari kota kecil dan ingin bepergian sebelum menetap.

programme.title: Nightmare Alley: Possession
programme.desc: Seorang penipu yang berusaha naik dari pekerja karnaval rendahan menjadi medium paranormal terkenal harus adu kecerdikan dengan seorang psikolog yang bertekad membongkar tipu dayanya.

programme.title: A Snow Globe Christmas
programme.desc: Seorang eksekutif TV yang sinis memandangi kota sempurna di dalam bola dunia Natal dan secara ajaib terhanyut ke sana. Ketika terbangun di kota sempurna yang tertutup salju, menikah dengan seorang penebang kayu lokal, ia menyadari bahwa semua itu bukan sekadar fantasi.

programme.title: Nightmare Alley: Possession
programme.desc: Seorang penipu yang berusaha naik dari pekerja karnaval rendahan menjadi medium paranormal terkenal harus adu kecerdikan dengan seorang psikolog yang bertekad membongkar tipu dayanya.

programme.title: The Ex Next Door
programme.desc: Cinta Katie Gatewood kepada suaminya, Dan, diuji ketika mantan pacar Dan yang terobsesi, Louisa, pindah ke rumah sebelah, dengan maksud untuk memisahkan pasangan bahagia itu dengan segala cara.

programme.title: 9 Bullets
programme.desc: Seorang penari olok-olok harus melarikan diri untuk menyelamatkan seorang bocah tetangga yang nyawanya terancam oleh mantan kekasihnya.

programme.title: Deadly Vendetta
programme.desc: Ketika seorang petugas pemasyarakatan ditemukan tewas di apartemennya, polisi menduga apakah seorang mantan narapidana membalas dendam padanya; namun, segera terungkap bahwa pembunuhan tersebut mungkin tidak terkait dengan pekerjaannya, setelah polisi mengungkap keterlibatan korban dalam segitiga cinta yang berbahaya

programme.title: Shadow Wolves
programme.desc: Seorang agen NSA nakal bergabung dengan kelompok elit pelacak penduduk asli Amerika yang menyebut diri mereka Serigala Bayangan saat mereka terlibat dalam misi untuk melindungi keadilan di Amerika dan luar negeri.

programme.title: Death Squad
programme.desc: Ketika semua jalur komunikasi terputus dengan sebuah fasilitas penelitian ilmiah rahasia yang berlokasi di bekas laboratorium biokimia Uni Soviet, sebuah perusahaan militer swasta dibentuk untuk memasuki fasilitas tersebut guna mencari dan mengevakuasi dokter kepala.

programme.desc: Dipandu dengan gaya yang menyenangkan dan penuh rasa ingin tahu, setiap episode menghadirkan inovasi desain rumah yang luar biasa sekaligus memberikan wawasan edukatif bagi seluruh keluarga.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Hailee Steinfeld
programme.desc: Saksikan Hailee Steinfeld, bintang serial “Dickinson”, bersiap-siap untuk menghadiri pemutaran perdana di karpet merah. Hari-hari Steinfeld memang penuh dengan kemewahan, tapi dia juga menyempatkan diri untuk hal-hal kecil. Berfoto selfie di Times Square? Kentang goreng dari layanan kamar? Kenapa tidak?

programme.title: 24 Hours With BTS In L.A.
programme.desc: sebagai fenomena K-pop global dalam kunjungan besar-besaran pertama mereka ke Los Angeles, di mana grup beranggotakan tujuh orang ini disambut oleh kerumunan penggemar yang antusias dan sorotan media yang gencar. Pada suatu malam langka di akhir perjalanan kilat mereka tepat setelah AMAs, dan sebelum tampil di acara Ellen, para anggota grup naik bus pesta bersama Vogue dan mengguncang kota tersebut.

programme.title: 50 Cent Answers The Webs...
programme.desc: Bintang film *Den of Thieves*, 50 Cent, menjawab pertanyaan-pertanyaan yang paling banyak dicari di internet tentang dirinya. Apakah 50 Cent pernah kuliah? Apakah 50 Cent seorang miliarder? Apakah 50 Cent orang Jamaika?? 50 Cent menjawab semua pertanyaan ini dan masih banyak lagi!

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Robert Pattinson
programme.desc: Ikuti Robert Pattinson saat ia berkeliling Paris, mencium aroma parfum, dan duduk di barisan depan pada peragaan busana Dior.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Ashley Graham
programme.desc: Ashley menceritakan bagaimana ia bertemu suaminya, produk apa yang benar-benar tak bisa ia tinggalkan, serta bagaimana ia bepergian ke dan dari Fashion Week tanpa repot berkat Lexus yang menyediakan layanan transportasi gratis bagi para desainer, model, editor, pengecer, dan profesional industri sebagai sponsor otomotif resmi New York Fashion Week.

programme.title: Paradise City
programme.desc: Ryan Swan harus mengukir jalan melalui dunia kriminal di Hawaii untuk membalaskan dendam pada gembong yang membunuh ayahnya.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Gigi Hadid
programme.desc: Supermodel Gigi Hadid memiliki jadwal yang padat dengan penerbangan dan pemotretan. Di sela-sela perjalanannya dari New York ke LA, Gigi mengundang Vogue ke kantor IMG, tempat ia mencoba menjawab 73 Pertanyaan. Gigi menceritakan siapa idola perempuannya, memamerkan keahlian tinjunya, dan menyusun daftar lagu-lagu Taylor Swift favoritnya.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Hailee Steinfeld
programme.desc: Saksikan Hailee Steinfeld, bintang serial “Dickinson”, bersiap-siap untuk menghadiri pemutaran perdana di karpet merah. Hari-hari Steinfeld memang penuh dengan kemewahan, tapi dia juga menyempatkan diri untuk hal-hal kecil. Berfoto selfie di Times Square? Kentang goreng dari layanan kamar? Kenapa tidak?

programme.title: Alien Rubicon
programme.desc: Sejumlah bola asing mendarat di planet Bumi dan dengan mudah menghancurkan segala sesuatu yang dilewatinya. Kini, seorang ilmuwan dan Presiden Amerika Serikat harus mencari cara untuk menghentikan invasi alien tersebut.

programme.title: The Ballad Of Lefty Brown
programme.desc: Seorang Barat yang mendebarkan dan penuh aksi, The Ballad of Lefty Brown adalah kisah tentang kesetiaan, persahabatan, dan upaya tanpa henti untuk mencapai keadilan.

programme.title: The Ballad Of Lefty Brown
programme.desc: Seorang Barat yang mendebarkan dan penuh aksi, The Ballad of Lefty Brown adalah kisah tentang kesetiaan, persahabatan, dan upaya tanpa henti untuk mencapai keadilan.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Emily R.
programme.desc: Model dan aktris Emily Ratajkowski membuka pintu apartemen loft bergaya artistiknya di Los Angeles untuk sesi permainan catur, pesta mendengarkan piringan hitam, dan sesi menggambar dadakan.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Maisie Williams
programme.desc: Bintang Game of Thrones, Maisie Williams, bertekad untuk menikmati Paris Fashion Week sepenuhnya. Dengan mengenakan busana yang serasi bersama pacarnya, Reuben Selby, Maisie menghadiri peragaan busana Thom Browne dan Givenchy.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: Agent Recon
programme.desc: Alastair, kapten pasukan keamanan rahasia Bumi, memanggil Jim pemula bertenaga super untuk bergabung dengan misi yang dipimpin oleh Kolonel Green dan Marinirnya yang terampil untuk melacak gangguan energi misterius di sebuah pangkalan di New Mexico.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Rapper YG
programme.desc: Ikuti YG saat ia membagi waktunya antara membuat musik, mengelola lini busananya, dan menjalankan tugas sebagai ayah, semuanya dalam satu hari yang padat.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Esther Perel
programme.desc: Psikoterapis terkenal dunia, Esther Perel, cukup sibuk di masa-masa sulit ini. Kini, lebih dari sebelumnya, orang-orang sedang mencari cara untuk menyeimbangkan kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Greta Gerwig
programme.desc: Aktris, pembuat film, dan sutradara film Barbie, Greta Gerwig, menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat sambil berjalan-jalan santai di Sony Pictures Studios. Dengan pemahaman mendalam tentang seperti apa kehidupan sebagai penulis skenario dan sutradara, Greta menjelaskan secara rinci segala hal yang terlibat dalam proses pembuatan filmnya dan menatap masa depannya di industri ini

programme.title: The Ballad Of Lefty Brown
programme.desc: Seorang Barat yang mendebarkan dan penuh aksi, The Ballad of Lefty Brown adalah kisah tentang kesetiaan, persahabatan, dan upaya tanpa henti untuk mencapai keadilan.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Cindy Crawford
programme.desc: Kehidupan sehari-hari supermodel Cindy Crawford meliputi berolahraga, makan siang bersama Helena Christensen, dan menyalakan lampu di Empire State Building.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Dan Levy
programme.desc: Bekerja sama dengan Google Nest: Dan Levy, pencipta dan bintang serial TV populer Schitt's Creek, mengundang Vogue ke rumahnya yang diterangi cahaya hangat dan menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat. Sambil didampingi sahabat setianya, Redmond, aktor yang pernah dinominasikan untuk Emmy ini berbincang tentang hubungannya dengan ayahnya, kecintaannya pada Jepang, serta betapa ia (dengan bangga) menikmati segelas cosmopolitan dengan es batu

programme.title: 24 Hours With Diplo
programme.desc: Diplo adalah sosok paling menarik yang sering terlewatkan di karpet merah. Dia punya lesung pipit! Dia punya celetukan-celetukan jenaka! Dan mungkin yang paling penting dari semuanya, dia punya gaya yang pas.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Winnie Harlow
programme.desc: Model terkenal Winnie Harlow membagikan rahasia kecantikan di rumah dan cara yang tepat untuk menikmati sirsak dalam cuplikan eksklusif tentang rutinitas santainya ini. Saksikan saat Winnie melakukan panggilan FaceTime dengan Tory Lanez, menikmati buah-buahan khas Jamaika, dan bermain Cadoo hingga larut malam.

programme.desc: Baru saja tampil di upacara penutupan Olimpiade di kota kelahirannya, Pyeongchang, Korea Selatan, bintang K-pop CL membuka pintu kamarnya di Hollywood Roosevelt Hotel yang bersejarah di Los Angeles tempat ia menginap sementara saat ini ketika Vogue datang mengetuk pintu dan melontarkan 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi tentang Kanye West, lilin favoritnya, penampilan cameo Borat, Disneyland, “Lamborghini Ungu,” eyeliner sebagai aksesori ideal, menjadi pecinta kucing, dan cara mengucapkan “cheers!” dalam bahasa Korea.

programme.title: Faith.Hope.Love
programme.desc: Ketika Faith yang baru saja bercerai mengikuti kontes dansa untuk menyelamatkan studio tariannya, dia bertemu Jimmy Hope dan menemukan kembali keyakinan dan impiannya.

programme.title: Sinister Tales: The Haunting
programme.desc: Sekelompok teman berkumpul untuk saling menceritakan kisah-kisah menyeramkan yang penuh dengan hantu, misteri, dan kejadian supranatural. Namun, ketika malam semakin larut, mereka menyadari bahwa kisah paling mengerikan bukanlah cerita yang mereka ceritakan, melainkan teror nyata yang mulai menghantui mereka satu per satu.

programme.title: Snapshot of Love
programme.desc: Adrian adalah seorang paparazzi Hollywood yang ditugaskan untuk mengambil foto seorang bintang yang sangat sulit ditemui, Parker Bennett. Tanpa disadarinya, ia akan mendapat kesempatan itu ketika mereka berdua menginap di penginapan yang sama di pegunungan Carolina Utara.

programme.title: Laugh Riot: The Misadventure
programme.desc: Frankie Blair Presents: Laugh Riot adalah serial komedi stand-up yang dinamis dan menghibur, menampilkan beragam komedian dengan gaya humor yang unik. Dipandu oleh Tahir Moore dan diproduseri oleh Frankie Blair, acara berenergi tinggi ini menghadirkan tawa segar sekaligus merayakan talenta-talenta berbakat yang selama ini kurang mendapat sorotan.

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world's largest, smallest and most exotic. programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection. [S,HD]

programme.title: Alan Titchmarsh's Gardening Club
programme.desc: Gardening advice series. Jason Williams heads to the Malvern Spring Festival for a behind-the-scenes look at 2025's standout gardens, Alan shares the latest seasonal highlights from his own plot, and Camilla Bassett-Smith travels to the Scottish hills to explore a beautifully preserved Japanese garden with a rich family history - elsewhere, Martha Swales offers a step-by-step guide on creating a wildlife pond to help bring nature to your doorstep, and Helen Cross shares practical ways to get children into gardening.

programme.title: James Martin's French Adventure
programme.desc: James is in the city of Arles, which is famous for its Roman architecture and where young daredevils play a dangerous game with bulls - it is also home to the largest market in Provence, so James sets up his mobile kitchen to cook a dish of John Dory with tomatoes, courgettes and clams all sourced from the surrounding stalls. A trip to award-winning wine producer Chateau Romanin then gets James to change his thinking on the merits of rose wine before he has a go at pottery with his teacher Cecile, who supplies her beautiful creations to L'Oustau de Baumaniere, a two-starred Michelin restaurant just 15 miles outside Arles. James then heads to an olive grove to cook some pan-fried lamb chops with baby aubergines before taking artistic inspiration from one of Arles's famous residents - Vincent Van Gogh. Back home, he bakes a satisfying salmon en croute and some chocolate and hazelnut meringues.

programme.title: James Martin's Saturday Morning
programme.desc: In the last episode before his summer break, James is joined at his home in the Hampshire countryside by singer Natasha Hamilton, chef Mike Reid and award-winning chocolatier Mark Tilling.

programme.title: Ainsley's Fantastic Flavours
programme.desc: Turning up the heat and taking your taste buds on a trip around the globe, Ainsley gets a little bit spicy in the kitchen! Bold flavours, vibrant colours and a cheeky kick to get you smiling, Ainsley makes a South Asian-inspired lamb dish and a comforting creamy chicken. Chef John Gregory-Smith brings some Middle Eastern magic with his spicy beef kofta, and Ainsley goes on a sweet and spicy adventure to find out more about hot honey.

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world. [S,HD]

programme.title: Love Your Weekend with Alan Titchmarsh
programme.desc: Joining Alan Titchmarsh for the final show before the summer break are Judy Parfitt, Brian Conley, Freddie Fox, Julian Ovenden and Honeysuckle Weeks. The Pony Club Mounted Games makes a return to Manor Farm, and we visit glorious Stonehenge. Horticulturalist Ashley Edwards is on hand with drought resistant plants, and food and drink expert Andy Clarke brings us the very best in festival food. Plus, we have an exclusive performance from the cast of High Society ahead of their West End debut.

programme.title: Prue Leith's Cotswold Kitchen
programme.desc: Prue's guest this time is actor, director and radio host Angela Griffin - Angela loves spicy food, so Prue decides to treat her to a Cambodian dish of fish and prawn amok. After Angela has more than she bargained for when she tries some raw galangal which proves to be incredibly hot, it's lasagne on the menu for Prue - a classic meat version and a vegetarian version - while John heads off to a local alpaca farm where he learns how the animals are taken care of and finds out what their wool is used for. Prue's food hero in this edition is a gin producer who forages for whatever nature has to offer to flavour the gin - with Prue then presenting a hack for making honeycomb, which she uses with John when they make a knickerbocker glory and a banana split, the two share stories of Prue's love of ice cream and John teases her about having a 'wolfhound lick'.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh transforms a deserving young family's inaccessible and 'boring with a capital B' patch of lawn in the Midlands - with the look and feel of an upmarket holiday resort, the team create a Mediterranean-style garden with a cool contemporary edge. Alan's bold design features an outdoor kitchen, entertaining spaces and a quiet contemplative water feature - planted throughout with fragrant arid looking plants, the garden completely captures the family's favourite holiday destination of Malta.

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world. [S,HD]

programme.title: Dr. No
programme.desc: Spy thriller film starring Sean Connery and Ursula Andress, 1962. programme.title: Deal or No Deal Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the iconic game show as reality TV legend Sam Thompson goes head-to-head with the infamous Banker - supported on the wings by his friends, family and a few famous faces including his former I'm a Celebrity... campmates, can Sam choose the right boxes and resist the Banker's tempting cash offers until just the right moment in order to take home a fortune for his chosen charity? There are no questions in this game show except for one...

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special

programme.desc: Charity is desperately trying to find a way to pay off Todd. Todd's malicious nature resurfaces. Kim tells Lydia her suspicions about Sam.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Summer resorts to drastic measures to escape incarceration, Daniel guesses who called in the social worker, David accuses Jodie of ruining Harper's milestone, and Hope gives Will a pep talk.

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson is on hand to ask the questions as six new players see if they have the 15 correct answers they need to win the top prize and head home as a millionaire.

programme.title: The Assembly
programme.desc: A brand-new collection of previously unseen questions from The Assembly Series 2, bringing together funny, fearless and unexpectedly moving moments from across the series. Stephen Fry is asked whether it's "bang out of order" to be rude to God, leading to a passionate answer about suffering, faith and why he would confront a creator rather than praise one. Later, he reflects on celibacy, the AIDS crisis and the insecurity that shaped his younger life. Rylan Clark is teased about Botox, fillers and his dazzling white teeth, before a more emotional question sees him open up about wanting children one day. Aitch is asked where he stands on abortion and whether men should have a say, and finds himself unexpectedly challenged to an arm wrestle - and loses. Nicola Sturgeon faces questions on major life changes and the surprise discovery that her face has appeared on toilet paper merchandise. Funny, direct, strange and disarmingly honest, this unseen episode captures The Assembly at its best.

programme.title: The Gentlemen
programme.desc: Guy Ritchie's stylish and fast-paced action comedy starring Matthew McConaughey and Charlie Hunnam. In London's slick underworld, American cannabis kingpin Mickey Pearson plans to sell his lucrative business, triggering a scramble among ambitious rivals and supposed allies, including ruthless kingpin Dry Eye and sleazy private detective Fletcher. With blackmail, double-crosses and betrayal around every corner, each player in the game fights to outwit the others in a high-stakes battle for control.

programme.desc: Members of the Midsomer-in-the-Marsh Ornithological Society fall out when one of them, Ralph Ford, claims that he has spotted a blue-crested hoopoe - the sighting puts him ahead in a list competition, but MMOS president Patrick Morgan says that the bird could never have been seen in Midsomer as it is native to Uganda. Ralph storms out of the meeting infuriated - the next day Patrick is found dead in Swansdown Lake, the scene of the alleged hoopoe sighting, and his body is pulled from the lake entangled in a mist net used to catch and release birds. The dead man's wife Nina, a former Russian prima ballerina, had recently become pregnant - before his death Patrick Morgan accused Nina of sleeping with another man and professed it to be impossible that she was pregnant. Was Patrick's obsession with ornithology really to blame for his death, or something more sinister? Barnaby and Jones attempt to discover the truth.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: DS Ronnie Brooks and DS Matt Devlin find themselves with no leads while investigating the case of 13-year-old Danny Jackson, who is found, kicked to death at Euston Station. When they manage to locate the teenager's family, they discover a tangled web of family loyalties that covers Danny's ex-junkie mother, her allegedly abusive boyfriend, and Danny's foster mother. As the police officers uncover more about Danny's life, they become emotionally involved. But who was responsible for the boy's death? Meanwhile, Crown Prosecutors James Steel and Alesha Phillips are up against defence barrister Beatrice McArdle, an old flame of James's. programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Ken and Margaret try to track down a missing husband who has absconded with the firm's money, and Harry employs cowboy electricians who leave the ballroom without electricity.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic police drama. When Regan loses his patience with a thug he is questioning about a wages snatch, the press are soon sniffing round for a police brutality story and the suspect's gangster brother puts out a contract on Regan.

programme.title: Fewer
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur decides that it might be a good idea to hire his second-hand cars out if he's not able to sell them, but Ray has some trouble with the customers.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series following salvage experts Mike Wolff and Frank Fritz as they travel around America and the rest of the globe trawling junkyards, garages, attics and barns for precious objects. Mike and Frank meet a man who claims to possess psychic powers and visit an old farm that turns out to be a treasure trove.

programme.title: World Cup Countdown
programme.desc: The countdown to the FIFA World Cup 2026 is on and Daniyal Khan, Cams Babayemi, Kweku Afari, Roy Keane, Ian Wright and the gang are giving a full rundown of what to expect ahead of the biggest tournament ever this summer. In this episode, we discuss England's chances and Ian Wright offers us his starting England 11. David McCready starts to recreate the best World Cup goals of all time and we visit New York City.

programme.title: Millionaire Hot Seat
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson hosts the exciting and fast-paced quiz where each episode sees six hopefuls compete for a one-million-pound prize - however, only one player can take their place in the Hot Seat at a time and answer multiple-choice questions to work their way up the Money Ladder. Unlike classic Millionaire, each question is against the clock and there is no room for indecision - if a player answers correctly, they remain in the Hot Seat and continue up the Money Ladder, but if they get a question wrong, they are eliminated, the Top Prize drops down, and the next player takes their place. Each player is given one Pass - a chance to pass the question on to the next player - but in doing so forfeit their place in the Hot Seat and risk not making it back there later on. Only one player will have a chance to win the top prize remaining on the ladder, and the player taking on that question must answer it correctly to take home the cash.

programme.title: Classic Cartoon
programme.desc: Classic Cartoon adalah serial kartun anak - anak yang di dalamnya terdapat serial kartun Casper dan teman - temannya.

programme.title: Abominable And The Invisible City
programme.desc: Serial Animasi yang melanjutkan kisah petualangan Yi Jin dan Peng dari film 'Abominable'. Mereka sekarang harus melindungi makhluk ajaib bernama Everest dan dunia tak kasat mata dari orang orang yang ingin mengeksploitasinya.

programme.desc: Lagu Anak Indonesia BaLiTa menyajikan animasi lagu anak Indonesia yang lucu, video belajar membaca alfabet, berhitung dan menyanyi ditemani oleh trio Baba Lili Tata.

programme.title: Laskar Pelangi 2
programme.desc: Ikal dan Arai menjalani hari-hari menimba ilmu di Sorbonne. Ikal mengambil master ekonomi sementara Arai berkutat dengan ilmu biologi. Di antara harapan ayah Ikal yang menghendaki mereka menjadi ahli pupuk dan apoteker.

programme.title: Kiko S3
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang keinginan Occi untuk bisa seperti Bulk Boggard yang kuat. Kiko pun berusaha membantu gurita kesayangannya tersebut agar bisa mewujudkan impiannya.

programme.title: Ricis The Adventure
programme.desc: Ricis bersama timnya menemukan ponsel misterius dan tersedot ke layar ponsel. Ternyata mereka diseret ke portal yang mengirim mereka ke Socidia City, kota metaverse tempat semua aktivitas jejaring sosial di dunia nyata.

programme.title: Dragons
programme.desc: Menceritakan seorang Putra seorang ketua Viking berteman dengan musuh mereka, seekor naga. Kisah ini berfokus pada kejadian terjadi di desa Berk Viking, di mana peternakan penduduk setempat kerap dicuri & diserang oleh seekor naga

programme.title: Little Charmers
programme.desc: Di tanah ajaib Charmville, Charmer-in-training Hazel dan sahabatnya, Posie dan Lavender, masih terbiasa dengan kekuatan mereka. Hazel yang tak kenal takut, memimpin kelompok dalam petualangan yang dirancang kemampuan magis mereka.

programme.title: Menggapai Mimpi
programme.desc: Program features tentang anak - anak sekolah yang berjuang dalam menggapai mimpi. Baik dalam dunia pendidikan formal maupun non formal mereka yang tetap semangat dalam meraih cita - citanya.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Berlatar 1.300 tahun setelah How to Train Your Dragon, dimana naga telah lama dianggap sebagai legenda. Ceritanya berpusat pada sekelompok remaja yang menemukan celah di Bumi akibat komet yang membuka dunia bawah tanah penuh naga

programme.title: Perjanjian Gaib
programme.desc: Andri dan sang istri Wati, punya kehidupan yang sederhana. Sehari-hari mereka hidup pas-pasan, jauh dari gelimang harta. Muak dengan kondisi mereka yang terhimpit masalah ekonomi, keduanya tak ragu memilih jalan instan berisiko.

programme.title: Tulah 6/13

programme.title: Bisik Hati Lara

programme.desc: From 2009. In Nazi-occupied France, a group of Jewish-American soldiers are selected to spread fear in the Third Reich by torturing and murdering Nazis.

programme.title: Dark Places
programme.desc: From 2015. Libby is the only survivor of a burglary where she witnessed the murder of her mother and sisters.

programme.title: Burnt

programme.title: Shell
programme.desc: From 2024. Samantha gets the chance of a lifetime when she is invited into the glittering world of Zoe - the powerful executive behind the health empire Shell. But when more patients start disappearing without a trace, Samantha is drawn into a web of lies and manipulation

programme.title: No Hard Feelings
programme.desc: From 2023. Maddie thinks she has found the solution to her financial problems when she discovers an exciting job ad: A wealthy couple is looking for someone to "date" their introverted 19-year-old, Percy.

programme.title: White Chicks

programme.title: Official Secrets

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Every district in the nation of Panem must send a boy and girl to fight to the death in the annual Hunger Games competition. Jennifer Lawrence is 16-year-old Katniss Everdeen, who volunteers to take her younger sister's place in the games.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs. Evil Dead 2: Ultimate Power
programme.desc: A kung fu fighter's Taoist priest friend has turned into a vampire, hell-bent on leading his legion of vampires to bring eternal darkness to the nation.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Chris joins his girlfriend Rose for a weekend at her family's estate. At first, their warm welcome seems like awkwardness about their interracial relationship—until disturbing truths emerge.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: In *Waterworld*, Kevin Costner stars as a lone maverick in a flooded future Earth, protecting a mother and daughter from a tribe of ruthless nomads. Dennis Hopper delivers a memorable villainous performance in this thrilling adventure.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: Es di kutub telah mencair, dan bumi ditutupi oleh air. Manusia-manusia yang tersisa pergi mengarungi lautan untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation—but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: Kehidupan seorang pekerja pabrik, Douglas Quaid, berubah drastis saat ia menjadi buronan setelah mengunjungi Rekall, sebuah perusahaan yang menanamkan memori buatan pada klien-kliennya.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 2
programme.desc: With the nation of Panem in a full scale war, Katniss confronts President Snow in the final showdown.

programme.title: Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Pt 2
programme.desc: Katniss dan tim pemberontak dari Distrik 13 bersiap untuk pertempuran terakhir yang akan menentukan nasib Panem.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Seorang wanita menyewa seorang gelandangan sebagai pemandunya menjelajahi New Orleans untuk mencari ayahnya yang hilang. Dalam prosesnya, mereka menemukan permainan kucing-kucingan yang mematikan di balik hilangnya ayahnya.

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Fong Sai Yuk joins the Red Flower revolution to topple the Manchus and restore the Ming. Amidst high-flying martial arts and rigid society demands, the legendary hero must also manage the chaos of his personal life, saddled with two presumptive wives!

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Tokoh utama Kanton, Fong Sai Yuk, terlibat dalam persaudaraan rahasia "Bunga Merah", yang berusaha menggulingkan kaisar Manchuria dan membangun kembali dinasti Ming. Gejolak sosial tersebut dipadukan dengan konflik moral pribadi Sai Yuk tentang bagaimana menyesuaikan diri dengan rezim persaudaraan yang kaku, dan di samping itu, menyelesaikan kehidupan cintanya yang rumit, dengan dua calon istri.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs. Evil Dead 2: Ultimate Power
programme.desc: A kung fu fighter's Taoist priest friend has turned into a vampire, hell-bent on leading his legion of vampires to bring eternal darkness to the nation.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs Evil Dead 2
programme.desc: Alur cerita semakin rumit ketika para pahlawan, Pak dan Hak, menemukan rencana mengerikan dari seorang jenius jahat bernama "DR. Magma" yang menghidupkan kembali orang mati yang jahat dan memaksa mereka melawan para biksu Shaolin yang telah menguasai seni bela diri.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 1
programme.desc: The worldwide phenomenon continues. Katniss (Jennifer Lawrence) has survived and destroyed the Hunger Games, and now rises with District 13 to fight against President Snow (Donald Sutherland).

programme.title: Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Pt 1

programme.title: Total Recall

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: Kehidupan seorang pekerja pabrik, Douglas Quaid, berubah drastis saat ia menjadi buronan setelah mengunjungi Rekall, sebuah perusahaan yang menanamkan memori buatan pada klien-kliennya.

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing
programme.desc: Corrupt tycoon kills witness to a crime. Only the girlfriend of a businessman with Chinese govt. ties saw it. Beijing bodyguard helps Hong Kong police protect her. But he and the witness develop feelings, complicating matters.

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing
programme.desc: Seorang taipan korup membunuh saksi kejahatan. Hanya pacar seorang pengusaha yang memiliki hubungan dengan pemerintah Tiongkok yang melihat kejadian tersebut. programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: Hard Target

programme.desc: A kung fu fighter's Taoist priest friend has turned into a vampire, hell-bent on leading his legion of vampires to bring eternal darkness to the nation.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs Evil Dead 2
programme.desc: Alur cerita semakin rumit ketika para pahlawan, Pak dan Hak, menemukan rencana mengerikan dari seorang jenius jahat bernama "DR. Magma" yang menghidupkan kembali orang mati yang jahat dan memaksa mereka melawan para biksu Shaolin yang telah menguasai seni bela diri.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Chris joins his girlfriend Rose for a weekend at her family's estate. At first, their warm welcome seems like awkwardness about their interracial relationship—until disturbing truths emerge.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda Afrika-Amerika mengunjungi orangtua pacarnya yang berkulit putih untuk akhir pekan, di mana kegelisahannya yang membara tentang penerimaan mereka terhadapnya akhirnya mencapai titik didih.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 1
programme.desc: The worldwide phenomenon continues. Katniss (Jennifer Lawrence) has survived and destroyed the Hunger Games, and now rises with District 13 to fight against President Snow (Donald Sutherland).

programme.title: Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Pt 1
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen berada di Distrik 13 setelah ia menghancurkan dunia game selamanya. Di bawah kepemimpinan Presiden Coin dan nasihat dari teman-teman kepercayaannya, Katniss mengembangkan sayapnya saat ia berjuang menyelamatkan Peeta dan bangsa yang tergerak oleh keberaniannya.

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Fong Sai Yuk joins the Red Flower revolution to topple the Manchus and restore the Ming. Amidst high-flying martial arts and rigid society demands, the legendary hero must also manage the chaos of his personal life, saddled with two presumptive wives!

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Tokoh utama Kanton, Fong Sai Yuk, terlibat dalam persaudaraan rahasia "Bunga Merah", yang berusaha menggulingkan kaisar Manchuria dan membangun kembali dinasti Ming. Gejolak sosial tersebut dipadukan dengan konflik moral pribadi Sai Yuk tentang bagaimana menyesuaikan diri dengan rezim persaudaraan yang kaku, dan di samping itu, menyelesaikan kehidupan cintanya yang rumit, dengan dua calon istri.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse Part 1
programme.desc: A massive earthquake creates a chain of events that threaten two of the largest nuclear reactors.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse, Pt 1 (Rock Action)

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse Part 2
programme.desc: A massive earthquake creates a chain of events that threaten two of the largest nuclear reactors.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse, Pt 2 (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Hotel-hotel di Las Vegas telah ambruk ke dalam tanah, Dr. Hill dan para penyintas yang tersisa berpacu untuk melarikan diri. Sementara itu, gempa bumi dahsyat mengancam akan membelah Amerika Utara menjadi dua dan pembangkit listrik tenaga nuklir berada tepat di jalurnya.

programme.title: Doomsday

programme.desc: Agen FBI Will Graham terpaksa membatalkan pensiun dininya demi memburu pembunuh berantai misterius "Peri Gigi". Ia bahkan harus meminta bantuan dari musuh bebuyutannya yang genius, Hannibal Lecter.

programme.title: Balto
programme.desc: Berdasarkan kisah nyata, Balto adalah petualangan animasi memukau tentang salah satu anjing paling berani sepanjang masa yang menantang badai Arktik untuk mengambil obat untuk anak-anak Alaska

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: Sebuah pertempuran aksi berskala besar terjadi di lautan, langit, dan daratan ketika armada angkatan laut umat manusia harus berjuang sekuat tenaga bertahan dari invasi kekuatan asing.

programme.title: American Graffiti
programme.desc: Sekelompok remaja yang berbeda saat mereka bergumul ritual peralihan masa remaja di tahun 1962. Pada malam sebelum dua dari mereka berangkat kuliah, empat sahabat SMA menjelajahi kota kecil mereka, menemukan cinta dan kenakalan.

programme.title: Back to the Future II

programme.title: Racing Files
programme.sub-title: McLaren – from Formula 1 to Can Am
programme.desc: McLaren is the second oldest active team in Formula 1 and now enjoys worldwide fame. However, when it was founded, hardly anyone would have expected that the team founded by New Zealand racing driver Bruce McLaren would develop into a heavyweight in the world of super sports cars and one of the best-known teams in motorsport. Racing Files tells the story of McLaren. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: NZ Speedway Championship 2026
programme.sub-title: Super Stock Teams NZ vs UK

programme.title: IMSA WeatherTech SportsCar Championship 2026
programme.sub-title: Motul Course de Monterey powered by Hyundai, WeatherTech Raceway Laguna Seca
programme.desc: The IMSA WeatherTech SportsCar Championship is an endurance championship in North America in which up to five different classes compete against each other in eleven events (channel info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026 Qualifying
programme.sub-title: Chevrolet Detroit GP, Streets of Detroit, Michigan

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: Would Superstock racing become a blueprint for Superbike racing? With another dominant performance from Hicky? The experts didn't really agree on this. A race full of surprises and an interesting podium. (Station info).

programme.title: IMSA WeatherTech SportsCar Championship 2026
programme.sub-title: Detroit Grand Prix, Detroit Street Circuit
programme.desc: The IMSA WeatherTech SportsCar Championship is an endurance championship in North America in which up to five different classes compete against each other in eleven events (channel info).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The format shows the highlights of various competitions from the international motorsport universe. The focus is on emotional racing moments, spectacular images and the stories behind the most important events in the scene. (Station info).

programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.sub-title: LIVE Bommarito Automotive Group 500, WW Technology Raceway, Illinois

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The format shows the highlights of various competitions from the international motorsport universe. The focus is on emotional racing moments, spectacular images and the stories behind the most important events in the scene. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: This time in Motorcycles: Motorcycling Made in England. Of course, THE British cult brand par excellence should not be missing, Triumph. We test the Tiger 800 and the Tiger 1050. With it, the English offer an absolute fun bike that is more competitive than ever with its typical triple and tight setup. And to get to the bottom of the British way of driving, Scotland is the destination of a motorcycle tour: to the Highlands with a BMW R 1200 RT. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: Benjamin Ketterl is one of 58 emergency drivers in the Munich area. The Yellow Angel is mostly on the move in the city, but highway patrols are also part of the roster. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Men's dreams are born in Bottrop. If you are looking for exclusivity and find the performance of a Mercedes AMG to be too low, you have come to the right place: The Brabus company is one of the best-known tuners in the world. Motorvision shows what makes a Brabus so unique. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.sub-title: Sustainability in mobility 1: Optimized combustion engines
programme.desc: Combustion engines have ensured our progress for 125 years. With the price of harmful emissions. In addition, the world population continues to grow and more and more cars are being sold. But this will only work for our earth/environment in the long term if vehicle emissions are drastically reduced at the same time. Green Wave – Sustainability in mobility shows developments as to how manufacturers want to further reduce the consumption of their vehicles in the future. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Whether Mercedes S-Class, BMW 7 Series or Audi A8, German sedans enjoy a worldwide reputation. They are famous for their perfection and prestige. Limousines Made in Germany are the epitome of status and they set the standards in terms of comfort, pioneering technology and safety systems. DreamCars presents the most famous, beautiful and luxurious German limousines. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The creators of the Apollo 3500 GT wanted to camouflage and deceive. The appearance of the sleek two-seater, which was released in 1962, is pure Italy, from the chrome spoke wheels, the leather-lined interior to the Pininfarina-style body. The Apollo's creators and technology come from the USA. There's a V8 engine from Buick under the long hood for good reason. The cheap technology should make the GT 3500 affordable on the American market. Nevertheless, the project was not a great success. Only just under 100 pieces were made. Today the Apollo 3500 GT is rarer than many classic Ferraris. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: Fuel of the future? Hydrogen and wind power? Hamburg Airport is experimenting with the climate-neutral production of kerosene. Also: six generations of Porsche 911 Turbo at the Hockenheimring with ex-rally world champion Walter Röhrl. And: the Aston Martin DBS Superleggera super sports car in the driving report and the Q2, Audi's smallest SUV, in the test. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: A M G: Always the epitome of top automotive performance, exclusivity and dynamic driving fun. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name “Green Hell”. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” – a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Today from the Supercross Cup in Munich. With the best drivers from all over the world traveling to take home the crown - who will be King of Munich? We don't know it yet, but in a few minutes we'll be a little wiser - the highlight of the indoor motorsport scene this season. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Geneva International Motor Show is traditionally the first European car show of the year and is one of the 5 most important car shows in the world! New generations, top models, vehicles with electric or alternative drives, manufacturers of almost all car brands show new products and cars that you will see on the streets tomorrow. Perfect Ride shows the highlights. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: 40 years of Mercedes tuning: AMG CLK 63 Black Edition. Total Siberia: 7100 km, and 33 teams in the Transsyberia Rally. Audi RS 4 and Porsche 911 4S: upper class of corner robbers. The VW Tiguan in the off-road test. Hummer H3 vs Toyota FJ Cruiser: Two off-roaders in comparison. Subaru Impreza WRX and Mitsubishi Lancer EVO 9 in comparison (transmitter information).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. We show you what you can do and how to do it. The German Race Wars invite you to sprint over the quarter mile. Fast cars, smoking tires and full throttle at the starting lights. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The stuntheroes from Action Concept are tough professionals. They throw themselves off houses, cause cars to fly or explode. Without the necessary seriousness and constant concentration when carrying out your work, nothing works. We sent our reporter Dean Malay to Action Concept to get to know the people, the characters behind the hard shell. Stunt coordinator Domi shows Dean the work processes at Action Concept, but also explains why the stuntman is called Tobi, Heidi. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In these episodes we look back at highlights from great events, Martin Utberg conducts interviews with guests and organizers via Skype. This time Classica Ice Marathon, Planai Classic and Black Forest Winter Challenge. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: From racetrack legends to sporty luxury road cruisers: no automobile manufacturer manages the balancing act between driving pleasure and comfort as well as BMW. With 550 hp and lightweight construction, the M4 CSL is a race track icon. We test it and show its story. What does the BMW M760e stand for? The power says driver's sedan! The luxurious furnishings speak for danger. We'll find out. (Station info).

programme.title: Belgian Rally Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Belgian Rally Championship is one of the most competitive rally championships at national level. This also attracts prominent guest starters such as Thierry Neuville, Craig Breen and Stéphane Lefebvre. (Station info).

programme.title: BTRDA Rallycross 2025
programme.desc: The races of the British Trial and Rally Drivers Association, which was founded in 1938, are highly competitive. The rallycross track with changing surfaces challenges the best drivers in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Tour European Rally 2026
programme.desc: The Tour European Rally 2023 traditionally starts with the promo event in Finland. The 58th edition of the spectacular Arctic Lapland Rally offers pure action and excitement on the snow and ice slopes of Finland. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: It was actually supposed to be the final day, but in the end only the super athletes and sidecars started, while the senior was postponed to the next day. However, history was written once again in the extremely competitive second super sports race. (Station info).

programme.title: FIM X-Trial World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Fédération Internationale de Motocyclisme has organized the X-Trial World Championship annually since 1993. In contrast to the outdoor discipline, the X-Trail competitions take place indoors. (Station info).

programme.title: FIM Sidecarcross World Championship 2026
programme.sub-title: GP of France, Castelnau de Levis

programme.title: FIM Supermoto World and European Championship 2026
FIM Enduro World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The show follows the world's best enduro pilots as they compete around the globe. (Station info).

programme.title: King of the Roads 2024
programme.desc: Kind of the Roads is a motorcycle road racing series where riders reach speeds of up to 200 mph (channel info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: BMW S 1000 XR und Harley-Davidson LiveWire
programme.desc: The new BMW S 1000 XR is something like a BMW X6 on two wheels: the all-round qualities of an SUV, plus extreme sportiness with 160 hp. We test the new XR around Barcelona. In addition: For two weeks, around 150 drivers race along country roads and through towns at top speeds of over 300 km/h. We get to the bottom of the Tourist Trophy myth. And: An electric Harley is currently racing across roads all over the world as a prototype called LiveWire. Journalists, dealers and customers test the electric-powered Harley without a V2 engine and a roaring sound. The electricity bullet is scheduled to come onto the market before 2020. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: Racing legend Hans Joachim Stuck, known as Strietzel, says goodbye to active racing at the 24-hour race. He won the first 24-hour race here at the age of just 19 and therefore chose the Nürburgring for his farewell performance. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: It was actually supposed to be the final day, but in the end only the super athletes and sidecars started, while the senior was postponed to the next day. However, history was written once again in the extremely competitive second super sports race. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Motorcycling – a hobby or sport with an adrenaline rush, but also with risk. The fact that the number of deaths in motorcycle accidents in Germany is falling is due, among other things, to the constant improvement of crash helmets. The helmet manufacturer Schuberth in Magdeburg plays a large part in these life-saving developments. Around 350 employees manufacture all kinds of protective helmets here. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: The automotive industry is currently changing completely: vehicles are developing into autonomous, fully networked digital devices. Road safety should improve significantly. But how do assistance systems actually work? And how safe are self-driving cars? MOTORVISION looks over the shoulders of Daimler engineers – shortly before the launch of the new S-Class in autumn 2017. (Station information).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are the epitome of luxury, they are irresistible and breathtaking, they are the automotive upper class, the English limousines. Whether Bentley, Rolls Royce or Jaguar, built with the most expensive materials, English limousines combine timeless luxury, unique comfort and superior power. Dream Cars presents the most exclusive and expensive English limousines. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The world's largest racing event for historic vehicles - the Goodwood Revival in England. Hosted by a count, the Earl of March. Over 150,000 fans flock to the country estate of the aristocratic racing fan. Visitors can expect many highlights, such as the race for the Shelby Cup, in which around 30 hot AC Cobras fight for fame and honor. Contemporary clothing is a must, racing legends do the honors, and you won't find more beautiful vintage cars from motorsport days gone by anywhere else. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: A world record of superlatives. The Porsche Taycan enters the Guinness Book of Records. Also: The hydrogen Hyundai Nexo, at the Hockenheimring with Walter Röhrl and the Skoda Trekka from the 1960s. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: In part 2 of the 120 years of Mercedes Motorsport, Car History tells the story of Mercedes in motorsport with many original recordings and original interviews, from the comeback after the accident in Le Mans, the beginnings of rallying in the sixties, the legendary appearance with the red pig in Spa, the countless DTM successes, the return to Le Mans with the prototypes to the Formula 1 World Championships with Mika Häkkinen and the triumph with your own team in Formula 1. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Today we start with our Nordschleife tourists, who - as soon as the track is a little drier - appear again at the ring and pursue their favorite hobby: accelerate and let the tires smoke! (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Around the world in a sailing catamaran. Her name is Royal Clipper, the queen of the seas. She is a five-masted full-rigged ship and the largest true sailing ship in the world. Three days on board give you the opportunity to explore the ship from the bilge to the 55 meter high masthead and to show how a special kind of cruiser works. The captain and his hotel manager are happy to present the ship and chief engineer Aleksander also gives a tour of his kingdom. Chef Rudy from the Philippines prepares one of his delicious specialties. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: They don't make room in the fast lane: sporty off-road vehicles. From mini-SUVs to luxury off-road vehicles, the boom is not slowing down. In Perfect Ride we get to the bottom of it all. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The BMW 2002 Turbo was an absolute blast in its day. A real racer and Porsche killer. The Mercedes C111 was developed as a concept study. With a Wankel engine, sophisticated aerodynamics and a number of technical innovations. Michelle Mouton was certainly the fastest female rally driver in the history of rallying. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.sub-title: Visit to the trade fair with a celebrity bonus
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. We show you what you can do and how to do it. The German Race Wars invite you to sprint over the quarter mile. Fast cars, smoking tires and full throttle at the starting lights. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Fog, darkness, a rear-end collision with many cars. This happens again and again on German motorways. The “Stunt Heroes” recreate such a scene. It is the starting point for a stunt with people burning, a firefighter who arrives too late and a car that blows up. You can see how this works in this episode of the stunt report series. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In this episode, Top Speed ​​presenter Martin Utberg visits the Oldtimer Gallery Toffen in Switzerland, where he completes a course to become an auctioneer, drives two special classic cars and meets one of the few female mechanics in the classic car scene. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Porsche now offers 27 derivatives of its cult model 911. The selection has never been so large. And it has never been possible to examine all models in one place until today! We are literally speed dating with the Porsche 911. Which variant can win the heart of Motorvision presenter Julian on a road trip through the Black Forest and the Palatinate and why? (Station info).

programme.title: FIM X-Trial World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Fédération Internationale de Motocyclisme has organized the X-Trial World Championship annually since 1993. In contrast to the outdoor discipline, the X-Trail competitions take place indoors. (Station info).

programme.title: FIM Sidecarcross World Championship 2026
programme.sub-title: GP of France, Castelnau de Levis

programme.title: FIM Enduro World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The show follows the world's best enduro pilots as they compete around the globe. (Station info).

programme.title: King of the Roads 2024
programme.desc: Kind of the Roads is a motorcycle road racing series where riders reach speeds of up to 200 mph (channel info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel info).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The format shows the highlights of various competitions from the international motorsport universe. The focus is on emotional racing moments, spectacular images and the stories behind the most important events in the scene. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: How will we transport goods and people in the future? The pack mules on our roads are also evolving and moving with the times. VW is working with Ford to save costs and pool expertise on the new van. At Volvo, safety has always been a priority – and that also applies to its trucks. And 5 exciting facts about the Mercedes eCitaro NMC4. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: Sand, scree, water or asphalt Adventures can be had on any surface if you have the right vehicle. The Can-Am Outlander and Maverick R are the ultimate fun machines for off-road driving fun. We put them to the test in Portugal. And this is supposed to be a Smart? Yes, actually #5 turns everything we thought we knew about the popular kissing ball upside down. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Today we start with our Nordschleife tourists, who - as soon as the track is a little drier - appear again at the ring and pursue their favorite hobby: accelerate and let the tires smoke! (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Around the world in a sailing catamaran. Her name is Royal Clipper, the queen of the seas. She is a five-masted full-rigged ship and the largest true sailing ship in the world. Three days on board give you the opportunity to explore the ship from the bilge to the 55 meter high masthead and to show how a special kind of cruiser works. The captain and his hotel manager are happy to present the ship and chief engineer Aleksander also gives a tour of his kingdom. Chef Rudy from the Philippines prepares one of his delicious specialties. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: They don't make room in the fast lane: sporty off-road vehicles. From mini-SUVs to luxury off-road vehicles, the boom is not slowing down. In Perfect Ride we get to the bottom of it all. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The BMW 2002 Turbo was an absolute blast in its day. A real racer and Porsche killer. The Mercedes C111 was developed as a concept study. With a Wankel engine, sophisticated aerodynamics and a number of technical innovations. Michelle Mouton was certainly the fastest female rally driver in the history of rallying. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.sub-title: Visit to the trade fair with a celebrity bonus
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. We show you what you can do and how to do it. The German Race Wars invite you to sprint over the quarter mile. Fast cars, smoking tires and full throttle at the starting lights. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Fog, darkness, a rear-end collision with many cars. This happens again and again on German motorways. The “Stunt Heroes” recreate such a scene. It is the starting point for a stunt with people burning, a firefighter who arrives too late and a car that blows up. You can see how this works in this episode of the stunt report series. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: For the first time in its glorious and long history, the traditional Italian brand Ducati is venturing into the cruiser segment. With a long and flat silhouette and forward footrests for comfortable gliding, the 156 hp The new Duc is supposed to conquer the US market and beat Harley-Davidson not only with its own weapons, but with completely new weapons. MOTORVISION TV tested the new XDiavel in San Diego on classic cruiser terrain. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: Their business is cars that don't drive. Regardless of whether it is an accident or illegal parking: cars that are not moving have to get out of the way. A case for the tow truckers. They clean up the traffic. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Artega – Visit to the youngest German sports car manufacturer. A look behind the scenes of the manufactory. Test Artega GT after the facelift. Introducing the Artega SE electric vehicle. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: More than any other vehicle, they represent the American lifestyle, US SUVs and pickups. They are extremely large, extremely strong and extremely luxurious and convey the feeling of unlimited possibilities and adventure. Whether it's the Cadillac Escalade, Chevrolet Tahoe, Ford Raptor or Dodge Ram, US SUVs and pickups are the kings of the highway. Dream Cars presents the most spectacular, powerful and exclusive US SUVs and pickups. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The creators of the Apollo 3500 GT wanted to camouflage and deceive. The appearance of the sleek two-seater, which was released in 1962, is pure Italy, from the chrome spoke wheels, the leather-lined interior to the Pininfarina-style body. The Apollo's creators and technology come from the USA. There's a V8 engine from Buick under the long hood for good reason. The cheap technology should make the GT 3500 affordable on the American market. Nevertheless, the project was not a great success. Only just under 100 pieces were made. Today the Apollo 3500 GT is rarer than many classic Ferraris. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: The new mobile magazine presents the latest trends and innovations in the automotive industry every week. Whether compact everyday heroes, windy city runabouts for the urban jungle, beefy SUVs for family trips or modern electric and hydrogen vehicles: our experts will take you on a test drive through the world of automobility of today and tomorrow. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: No consumer good is fought over as fiercely and as expensively as the car. As soon as the first car started rolling in 1886, advertising began to tout the great benefits of motor vehicles for humanity. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name Green Hell. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many racers at heart race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the Green Hell is a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: BMW M1, the legendary vehicles of the Procar series, are all back at the start in Salzburg for the first time. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: One of the top topics in this episode of Perfect Ride: topless models. With them, every adventure starts with a thrill: Spyder, Speedster, Roadster – in short: convertibles. Free driving and feeling of life in all variations (channel information).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. The Audi quattro, also called Urquattro, is a sports coupe from the Audi brand that was manufactured for a good ten years starting in 1980. The Urquattro is part of the success story of Audi's quattro drive in sports and road vehicles. Reporter Maximilian Engert presents the vehicle. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Only the best for Christmas. The topics today at Tuning: Our editorial team always goes full throttle. Best of eroticism. Peaceful Christmas time? Not at the X-mas Race in Eisenach. Things get busy here even in winter. Abt and MTM put the Audi R8 on the gift table. Which is the better package? And: Listen up! The best sounds with goosebumps guaranteed. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The “Stunt Heroes” from action concept film a car rollover. But that's not enough for stunt coordinator Carl. His motto: if already, then already! That's why he throws in a juicy shootout at the same time. He also has a surprise in store for his workshop boss: Uwe should sit in the passenger seat when the vehicle rolls over - for the very first time! New spectacular report about the creation of a car stunt! (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In this episode, classic car rally expert Christian von Hofmann explains how to drive special stages in classic car rallies and how the various devices work. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: English luxury and German lifestyle. With an extended wheelbase, the Bentley Bentayga focuses on its rear passengers and pampers them with flawless workmanship and a champagne cooler. In the Mercedes CLE 53, however, the best place is behind the steering wheel. Mercedes wants to arouse emotions again with a 3-liter in-line six-cylinder engine. (Station info).

programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: In this episode of the TT2024 we are bringing the second race of the super athletes and the super twins in a double pack. The opportunity for Hicky and Davey to counter and for Michael Dunlop to further increase his record winning account at the TT. (Station info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: UIM F1H2O World Powerboat Championship 2025
programme.desc: Curtain up for Formula 1 in motorboat racing: According to the world umbrella organization UIM, the H20 is the fastest outboard racing boat series in circuit racing and has been dominated by Philippe Chiappe for years. (Station info).

programme.title: Trinity Is Still My Name
programme.desc: Two brothers try to fulfill the promise they made to their dying father.

programme.title: You Cant Win Em All
programme.desc: As the Ottoman Empire collapses throughout Turkey in 1922, a number of adventurers from all over the world sign on to protect the locals from thieves and marauders--for a hefty price. Two such mercenaries are Adam and Josh, who are hired by provincial Turkish governor Osman. Adam and Josh are expected to protect their boss' gold shipment, and to provide safe conduct for Osman Bey's three daughters. Along the way, our 'heroes' decide to forget their mission and abscond with the gold, but their plans are foiled by their own inherent ineptitude--and by the bothersome interference of duplicitous Colonel Elci.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: Hondo is told to help make peace with Indian Chief Vittoro, whose daughter--Hondo's wife--had been killed by the Cavalry. Once the peace pipe is smoked, Hondo must deal with a renegade Native American who threatens the peace by randomly attacking settlers.

programme.title: Alive Or Preferably Dead
programme.desc: Two brothers, Monty and Ted, will inherit $300,000 if they manage to live together for six months.

programme.title: Beyond Justice
programme.desc: Ex-C.I.A. Agent Tom Burton (Rutger Hauer) goes to Morocco with businesswoman Christine Sanders (Carol Alt) to rescue her son, the kidnapped heir to a desert fortune.

programme.title: Twin Dragons
programme.desc: Jackie Chan plays a dual role as twins separated at birth who grow up and cross paths. Two brothers, one becomes a famous conductor and pianist in New York, another becomes a racecar driver and bodyguard in Hong Kong. When the conductor travels to Hong Kong to give a concert, the twins get caught up in each other's business, about which they are anything but experts.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Aledo, Texas
programme.desc: Years after the body of a young woman is found strangled to death in a creek bed, law enforcement finally closes the case; a closer look raises questions about the investigation.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Vinalhaven, Maine
programme.desc: On a remote island, a dispute between two lobstermen is settled the way islanders do: face-to-face; the conflict turns deadly when one swings an ax - leaving locals to dispute whether the death was self-defense or murder.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Benton, MO
programme.desc: After a teenage girl is found murdered in her car on the side of a highway, a stranger from out of town is convicted of her murder; when the deputy who originally discovered the body becomes sheriff, he calls everything into question.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Wahpeton, ND
programme.desc: When the body of a missing student is discovered in the river near a small college town, the community questions the role law enforcement may have played in his death.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: New Albany, Mississippi
programme.desc: When a beloved member of a tight-knit community is killed, the town cries out for immediate justice; after a young man is sentenced to death for the crime, and an out-of-town lawyer argues they convicted an innocent man.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Prichard, Alabama
programme.desc: The murder of a gender-nonconforming Black teenager remains unsolved despite pressure from family and friends - raising issues about the increase of violence, and the lack of justice for trans murder victims across the country.

programme.desc: Continuing his island-hopping odyssey Paul sets sail on an island pilgrimage in the footsteps of saints, visiting Lismore, Colonsay and Oronsay. (Part 4 of 6) (S)

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Isles
programme.desc: In the fifth episode, Paul Murton explores the islands scattered in the Firth of Forth. He discovers that these seemingly peaceful islands have a dramatic history of war. (Part 5 of 6) (S)

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: Series exploring the expansion of railways in the Victorian era. Ruth Goodman, Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn find out how railways transformed the British diet. (Part 3 of 6) (S)
